tEn: Mamba-3: Improved Sequence Modeling using State Space Principles
tZh: Mamba-3：利用状态空间原理改进序列建模
sEn: Mamba-3 improves sequence modeling by combining SSM discretization, complex-valued state updates, and MIMO formulation, achieving better performance-efficiency trade-offs.
sZh: Mamba-3 通过结合 SSM 离散化、复数值状态更新和多输入多输出公式，在性能与效率之间实现了更好的平衡。
absEn: Scaling inference-time compute has emerged as an important driver of LLM performance, making inference efficiency a central focus of model design alongside model quality. While the current Transformer-based models deliver strong model quality, their quadratic compute and linear memory make inference expensive. This has spurred the development of sub-quadratic models with reduced linear compute and constant memory requirements. However, many recent linear models trade off model quality and capability for algorithmic efficiency, failing on tasks such as state tracking. Moreover, their theoretically linear inference remains hardware-inefficient in practice. Guided by an inference-first perspective, we introduce three core methodological improvements inspired by the state space model (SSM) viewpoint of linear models. We combine: (1) a more expressive recurrence derived from SSM discretization, (2) a complex-valued state update rule that enables richer state tracking, and (3) a multi-input, multi-output (MIMO) formulation for better model performance without increasing decode latency. Together with architectural refinements, our Mamba-3 model achieves significant gains across retrieval, state-tracking, and downstream language modeling tasks. At the 1.5B scale, Mamba-3 improves average downstream accuracy by 0.6 percentage points compared to the next best model (Gated DeltaNet), with Mamba-3's MIMO variant further improving accuracy by another 1.2 points for a total 1.8 point gain. Across state-size experiments, Mamba-3 achieves comparable perplexity to Mamba-2 despite using half of its predecessor's state size. Our evaluations demonstrate Mamba-3's ability to advance the performance-efficiency Pareto frontier.
absZh: 扩展推理时计算已成为提升大语言模型性能的重要驱动力，使得推理效率与模型质量共同成为模型设计的核心关注点。尽管当前基于 Transformer 的模型提供了强大的模型质量，但其二次计算复杂度和线性内存需求导致推理成本高昂。这推动了亚二次复杂度模型的发展，这些模型具有降低的线性计算和恒定的内存需求。然而，许多近期线性模型为了算法效率而牺牲了模型质量和能力，在状态追踪等任务上表现不佳。此外，它们理论上的线性推理在实际中仍存在硬件效率低下的问题。基于推理优先的视角，我们从线性模型的状态空间模型（SSM）观点出发，引入了三项核心方法改进。我们结合了：（1）源自 SSM 离散化的更具表达力的循环机制，（2）实现更丰富状态追踪的复数值状态更新规则，以及（3）多输入多输出（MIMO）公式，以在不增加解码延迟的情况下提升模型性能。结合架构优化，我们的 Mamba-3 模型在检索、状态追踪和下游语言建模任务上均取得了显著提升。在 1.5B 规模下，Mamba-3 相比次优模型（Gated DeltaNet）将平均下游准确率提升了 0.6 个百分点，其 MIMO 变体进一步将准确率提升 1.2 个百分点，总计提升 1.8 个百分点。在状态大小实验中，Mamba-3 在仅使用其前身 Mamba-2 一半状态大小的情况下，实现了与 Mamba-2 相当的困惑度。我们的评估表明，Mamba-3 能够推动性能-效率帕累托前沿的进步。

contrib.en: Introduces exponential-trapezoidal discretization for SSMs, improving state-input integral approximation.
contrib.zh: 引入指数-梯形离散化方法，改进了状态-输入积分的近似精度。

contrib.en: Proposes complex-valued state transitions via data-dependent RoPE, enabling state-tracking tasks like parity.
contrib.zh: 通过数据依赖的 RoPE 提出复数值状态转移，实现了奇偶性等状态追踪任务。

contrib.en: Develops MIMO formulation for SSMs, increasing inference FLOPs without raising decode latency.
contrib.zh: 开发了 SSM 的多输入多输出（MIMO）公式，在不增加解码延迟的情况下提高推理算力。

contrib.en: Achieves 1.8 point accuracy gain over Gated DeltaNet at 1.5B scale on downstream tasks.
contrib.zh: 在 1.5B 规模的下游任务上，相比 Gated DeltaNet 准确率提升 1.8 个百分点。

contrib.en: Matches Mamba-2 perplexity with half the state size, advancing the performance-efficiency Pareto frontier.
contrib.zh: 以一半的状态大小达到 Mamba-2 的困惑度，推进了性能-效率帕累托前沿。

contrib.en: Releases optimized Triton and CuTe kernels for fast training and inference of Mamba-3.
contrib.zh: 发布了优化的 Triton 和 CuTe 内核，支持 Mamba-3 的快速训练和推理。

limits.en: Mamba-3 still underperforms Transformers on retrieval tasks due to fixed-size state compression.
limits.zh: 由于固定大小的状态压缩，Mamba-3 在检索任务上仍不如 Transformer。

limits.en: MIMO variant increases training FLOPs by factor R, requiring more compute for pre-training.
limits.zh: MIMO 变体将训练算力增加 R 倍，需要更多预训练计算资源。

limits.en: Complex-valued transitions may not benefit all modalities; effectiveness on vision/audio untested.
limits.zh: 复数值转移可能不适用于所有模态；在视觉/音频上的有效性尚未测试。

limits.en: Exponential-trapezoidal discretization adds complexity; optimal λt selection remains empirical.
limits.zh: 指数-梯形离散化增加了复杂性；最优λt 的选择仍依赖经验。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to 1.5B scale and 100B tokens; scaling to larger models may reveal new trade-offs.
limits.zh: 评估限于 1.5B 规模和 100B token；扩展到更大模型可能揭示新的权衡。

items.en: Scaling inference-time compute has emerged as an important driver of LLM performance, making inference efficiency a central focus of model design alongside model quality. While the current Transformer-based models deliver strong model quality, their quadratic compute and linear memory make inference expensive. This has spurred the development of sub-quadratic models with reduced linear compute and constant memory requirements. However, many recent linear models trade off model quality and capability for algorithmic efficiency, failing on tasks such as state tracking. Moreover, their theoretically linear inference remains hardware-inefficient in practice. Guided by an inference-first perspective, we introduce three core methodological improvements inspired by the state space model (SSM) viewpoint of linear models. We combine: (1) a more expressive recurrence derived from SSM discretization, (2) a complex-valued state update rule that enables richer state tracking, and (3) a multi-input, multi-output (MIMO) formulation for better model performance without increasing decode latency. Together with architectural refinements, our Mamba-3 model achieves significant gains across retrieval, state-tracking, and downstream language modeling tasks. At the 1.5B scale, Mamba-3 improves average downstream accuracy by 0.6 percentage points compared to the next best model (Gated DeltaNet), with Mamba-3’s MIMO variant further improving accuracy by another 1.2 points for a total 1.8 point gain. Across state-size experiments, Mamba-3 achieves comparable perplexity to Mamba-2 despite using half of its predecessor’s state size. Our evaluations demonstrate Mamba-3’s ability to advance the performance-efficiency Pareto frontier.
items.zh: 推理时算力扩展已成为提升大语言模型性能的重要驱动力，使得推理效率与模型质量一同成为模型设计的核心焦点。尽管当前基于 Transformer 的模型提供了强大的模型质量，但其二次方算力和线性内存使得推理成本高昂。这推动了具有线性算力和恒定内存需求的次二次方模型的发展。然而，许多近期线性模型为了算法效率而牺牲了模型质量和能力，在状态追踪等任务上表现不佳。此外，它们理论上的线性推理在实践中仍存在硬件效率低下的问题。以推理优先为视角，我们从线性模型的状态空间模型（SSM）观点出发，引入了三项核心方法改进。我们结合了：（1）源自 SSM 离散化的更具表达力的递推关系，（2）复数状态更新规则，可实现更丰富的状态追踪，以及（3）多输入多输出（MIMO）公式，在不增加解码延迟的情况下提升模型性能。结合架构优化，我们的 Mamba-3 模型在检索、状态追踪和下游语言建模任务上取得了显著提升。在 1.5B 规模下，Mamba-3 相比次优模型（Gated DeltaNet）平均下游准确率提升 0.6 个百分点，其 MIMO 变体进一步将准确率提升 1.2 个百分点，总计提升 1.8 个百分点。在状态大小实验中，Mamba-3 在仅使用其前身一半状态大小的情况下，实现了与 Mamba-2 相当的语言建模困惑度。我们的评估表明，Mamba-3 能够推进性能-效率帕累托前沿。

items.en: Test-time compute has emerged as a key driver of progress in LLMs, with techniques like chain-of-thought reasoning and iterative refinement demonstrating that inference-time scaling can unlock new capabilities [wu2025inferencescalinglawsempirical, snell2024scalingllmtesttimecompute]. The rapid rise of parallel, agentic workflows has only intensified the need for efficient inference and deployment of such models [openai_gpt53_codex_2026, anthropic_claude_opus_46_2026]. This paradigm shift makes inference efficiency [kwon2023efficientmemorymanagementlarge, li2024llminferenceservingsurvey] paramount, as the practical impact of AI systems now depends critically on their ability to perform large-scale inference during deployment. Model architecture design plays a fundamental role in determining inference efficiency, as architectural choices directly dictate the computational and memory requirements during generation. While Transformer-based models [vaswani2017attention] are the current industry standard, they are fundamentally bottlenecked by linearly increasing memory demands through the KV cache and quadratically increasing compute requirements through the self-attention mechanism. These drawbacks have motivated recent lines of work on sub-quadratic models, e.g., state space models (SSMs) and linear attention, which retain constant memory and linear compute while attaining comparable or better performance than their Transformer counterparts. These models have made it into the mainstream, with layers such as Mamba-2 [dao2024transformersssmsgeneralizedmodels] and Gated DeltaNet (GDN) [schlag2021deltarule, yang2025parallelizinglineartransformersdelta] recently incorporated into large-scale hybrid models that match the performance of pure Transformer alternatives with much higher efficiency [nvidia2025nemotronhfamilyaccurateefficient, qwen3technicalreport, kimiteam2025kimilinearexpressiveefficient, tencenthunyuanteam2025hunyuanturbosadvancinglargelanguage].
items.zh: 测试时算力已成为大语言模型进步的关键驱动力，思维链推理和迭代优化等技术表明，推理时扩展可以解锁新能力。并行化、智能体式工作流的迅速兴起进一步加剧了对高效推理和部署此类模型的需求。这一范式转变使推理效率变得至关重要，因为 AI 系统的实际影响现在关键取决于其在部署期间执行大规模推理的能力。模型架构设计在决定推理效率方面起着基础性作用，因为架构选择直接决定了生成过程中的计算和内存需求。虽然基于 Transformer 的模型是当前的行业标准，但它们从根本上受到 KV 缓存线性增长的内存需求和自注意力机制二次方增长的计算需求的瓶颈限制。这些缺点激发了近期关于次二次方模型的研究，例如状态空间模型（SSM）和线性注意力，这些模型在保持恒定内存和线性算力的同时，实现了与 Transformer 相当或更优的性能。这些模型已进入主流，例如 Mamba-2 和 Gated DeltaNet（GDN）等层最近被集成到大规模混合模型中，这些模型以更高的效率匹配了纯 Transformer 替代方案的性能。

items.en: Despite the success of linear models, significant progress remains in improving their performance, in particular on advancing the Pareto frontier between model quality and inference efficiency. For example, Mamba-2 was developed to improve training speed and simplicity over Mamba-1 [gu2024mambalineartimesequencemodeling], by sacrificing some expressivity and thus performing worse for inference-matched models. In addition, they have been shown to lack certain capabilities, such as poor state-tracking abilities, e.g., simply determining parity of bit sequences [grazzi2025unlockingstatetrackinglinearrnns, sarrof2024expressivecapacitystatespace]. Finally, despite these sub-quadratic models being prized for theoretically efficient inference and thus their widespread adoption, their inference algorithms are not hardware efficient. In particular, because these algorithms were developed from a training perspective, their decoding phase has low arithmetic intensity (the ratio of FLOPs to memory traffic), resulting in large portions of hardware remaining idle.
items.zh: 尽管线性模型取得了成功，但在提升其性能方面仍有显著进展，特别是在推进模型质量与推理效率之间的帕累托前沿方面。例如，Mamba-2 的开发旨在提升 Mamba-1 的训练速度和简洁性，但牺牲了一定的表达力，因此在推理匹配模型中表现较差。此外，它们已被证明缺乏某些能力，例如状态追踪能力差，比如简单确定比特序列的奇偶性。最后，尽管这些次二次方模型因理论上高效的推理而备受推崇并得到广泛采用，但其推理算法在硬件上并不高效。特别是，由于这些算法是从训练角度开发的，其解码阶段算术强度低（FLOPs 与内存流量之比），导致硬件大部分时间处于空闲状态。

items.en: To develop more performant models from an inference-first paradigm, we introduce three core methodological changes on top of Mamba-2, influenced by an SSM-centric viewpoint of sub-quadratic models.
items.zh: 为了从推理优先的范式出发开发性能更强的模型，我们在 Mamba-2 的基础上引入了三项核心方法变革，这些变革受到以 SSM 为中心的次二次方模型视角的影响。

items.en: We provide a simple technique for discretizing time-varying, selective SSMs. Through our framework, we can derive several new discretization methods. One of our instantiations, referred to as “exponential-Euler,” formalizes Mamba-1 and Mamba-2’s heuristic discretization that previously lacked theoretical justification. Our new “exponential-trapezoidal” instantiation is a more expressive generalization of “exponential-Euler,” where the recurrence can be expanded to reveal an implicit convolution applied on the SSM input. Combined with explicit B,CB,C bias terms, Mamba-3 can empirically replace the short causal convolution in language model architectures, which was previously hypothesized to be essential for recurrent models.
items.zh: 我们提供了一种简单的技术，用于离散化时变选择性 SSM。通过我们的框架，可以推导出几种新的离散化方法。我们的一个实例化称为“指数-欧拉”，它形式化了 Mamba-1 和 Mamba-2 之前缺乏理论依据的启发式离散化。我们新的“指数-梯形”实例化是“指数-欧拉”更具表达力的推广，其中递推关系可以展开，揭示出应用于 SSM 输入的隐式卷积。结合显式的 B、C 偏置项，Mamba-3 可以经验性地替代语言模型架构中的短因果卷积，而此前认为该卷积对循环模型至关重要。

items.en: By viewing the underlying SSM of Mamba-3 as complex-valued, we enable a more expressive state update than Mamba-2’s. This change in update rule, designed to be lightweight for training and inference, overcomes the lack of state-tracking ability common in many current linear models. We show that our complex-valued update rule is equivalent to a data-dependent rotary embedding and can be efficiently computed [su2023roformerenhancedtransformerrotary], and empirically demonstrate its ability to solve synthetic tasks outside the capabilities of prior linear models.
items.zh: 通过将 Mamba-3 的底层 SSM 视为复数形式，我们实现了比 Mamba-2 更具表达力的状态更新。这种更新规则的变化旨在轻量化训练和推理，克服了许多当前线性模型普遍缺乏的状态追踪能力。我们展示了复数更新规则等价于数据依赖的旋转位置编码，并且可以高效计算，同时经验性地证明了其解决先前线性模型无法解决的合成任务的能力。

items.en: To improve FLOP efficiency during decoding, we switch from an outer-product–based state update to a matrix-multiplication–based state update. From the view of the signal processing foundations of SSMs, such a transition exactly coincides with the generalization from a single-input single-output (SISO) sequence dynamics to a multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) one. Here, we find that MIMO is particularly suitable for inference, as the extra expressivity enables more computation during the memory-bound state update during decoding, without increasing the state size and compromising speed.
items.zh: 为了提升解码时的 FLOP 效率，我们将基于外积的状态更新切换为基于矩阵乘法的状态更新。从 SSM 信号处理基础的角度看，这种转变恰好对应于从单输入单输出（SISO）序列动力学到多输入多输出（MIMO）动力学的推广。我们发现 MIMO 特别适合推理，因为额外的表达力使得在解码期间内存受限的状态更新中可以执行更多计算，而无需增加状态大小或牺牲速度。

items.en: Put together, these improvements form the core of our Mamba-3 layer. Methodologically, we note that these all arise naturally from an SSM-centric perspective but are not immediate from other popular viewpoints of modern linear layers such as linear attention or test-time regression; we discuss these connections further in Section˜5. Empirically, we validate our new model’s abilities and capabilities on a suite of synthetic state-tracking and language-modeling tasks.
items.zh: 综合这些改进，构成了我们 Mamba-3 层的核心。从方法论上讲，我们注意到这些改进都自然源于以 SSM 为中心的视角，但从其他流行的现代线性层视角（如线性注意力或测试时回归）来看并不直接；我们将在第 5 节进一步讨论这些联系。在经验上，我们在一系列合成状态追踪和语言建模任务上验证了新模型的能力和性能。

items.en: Better Quality. At 1.5B scale, Mamba-3 (MIMO) improves downstream language modeling accuracy by +2.2 over Transformers, +1.9 points over Mamba-2, and +1.8 over GDN, while Mamba-3 (SISO) improves over the next best model, GDN, by +0.6 points. Furthermore, across state size experiments, Mamba-3 (MIMO) with state size 64 matches the perplexity of Mamba-2 with state size 128, effectively achieving the same language modeling performance with half the latency.
items.zh: 更高质量。在 1.5B 规模下，Mamba-3（MIMO）在下游语言建模准确率上比 Transformer 提升+2.2，比 Mamba-2 提升+1.9，比 GDN 提升+1.8，而 Mamba-3（SISO）比次优模型 GDN 提升+0.6。此外，在状态大小实验中，状态大小为 64 的 Mamba-3（MIMO）匹配了状态大小为 128 的 Mamba-2 的困惑度，实际上以一半的延迟实现了相同的语言建模性能。

items.en: New Capabilities. Mamba-3’s complexification of the SSM state enables it to solve synthetic state-tracking tasks that Mamba-2 cannot. We empirically demonstrate that the efficient RoPE-like calculation is able to near perfectly solve arithmetic tasks, while Mamba-3 without RoPE and Mamba-2 perform no better than random guessing.
items.zh: 新能力。Mamba-3 对 SSM 状态的复数化使其能够解决 Mamba-2 无法解决的合成状态追踪任务。我们经验性地证明，高效的类 RoPE 计算能够近乎完美地解决算术任务，而未经 RoPE 的 Mamba-3 和 Mamba-2 的表现不比随机猜测好。

items.en: Inference Efficiency. Mamba-3 (MIMO) improves hardware utilization. It increases decoding FLOPs by up to 4×\times relative to Mamba-2 at fixed state size, while maintaining similar wall-clock decode latency, and simultaneously improving perplexity and downstream performance. We release fast training and inference kernels for Mamba-3.111https://github.com/state-spaces/mamba.
items.zh: 推理效率。Mamba-3（MIMO）提升了硬件利用率。在固定状态大小下，相对于 Mamba-2，它将解码 FLOPs 提升了高达 4 倍，同时保持相似的墙钟解码延迟，并同时改进了困惑度和下游性能。我们发布了 Mamba-3 的快速训练和推理内核。

items.en: Mamba-3 (SISO) improves quality and capability over prior linear models, and Mamba-3 (MIMO) further improves performance over Mamba-3 (SISO) and other strong baselines while matching inference speed with Mamba-2. Both of our Mamba-3 variants advance the performance-latency Pareto frontier through their strong modeling capabilities and hardware-efficient design.
items.zh: Mamba-3（SISO）在质量和能力上优于先前的线性模型，而 Mamba-3（MIMO）在匹配 Mamba-2 推理速度的同时，进一步提升了相对于 Mamba-3（SISO）和其他强基线的性能。我们的两种 Mamba-3 变体通过其强大的建模能力和硬件高效设计，推进了性能-延迟帕累托前沿。

Both the state-transition and state-input are made data-dependent through the projection of Δt∈ℝ>0\Delta_{t}\in\mathbb{R}_{>0} and 𝑩,𝑪∈ℝN{\bm{B}},{\bm{C}}\in\mathbb{R}^{N} from the current token. By parameterizing the state-transition 𝑨t{\bm{A}}_{t} as a scalar times identity (𝑨t=At​𝑰N×N{\bm{A}}_{t}=A_{t}\bm{I}_{N\times N}, where At∈ℝ<0A_{t}\in\mathbb{R}_{<0}), the SSM recurrence can be efficiently computed with the matrix multiplication tensor cores of GPUs. items.en: The data-dependent state-transition αt\alpha_{t} controls the memory horizon of each SSM within the layer. Δt\Delta_{t} in particular modulates both the state-transition and state-input: a larger Δt\Delta_{t} forgets faster and up-weights the current token more strongly, while a smaller Δt\Delta_{t} retains the hidden state with minimal contributions from the current token.
items.zh: 数据依赖的状态转移α_t 控制层内每个 SSM 的记忆范围。特别是Δt 同时调节状态转移和状态输入：较大的Δt 遗忘更快并更强烈地加权当前 token，而较小的Δt 保留隐藏状态，当前 token 的贡献最小。

In Mamba-3, we empirically found that data-dependent AtA_{t} has similar performance to data-independent AtA_{t}, and chose the former as a default for consistency so that all SSM parameters are data-dependent.
items.zh: 在 Mamba-2 中，A_t 是数据无关的，因为整体离散转移α_t:=e^{Δt A_t}通过Δt 是数据依赖的。在 Mamba-3 中，我们经验性地发现数据依赖的 A_t 与数据无关的 A_t 性能相似，为了保持一致性，我们选择前者作为默认设置，以便所有 SSM 参数都是数据依赖的。

full.sec: 2.3 Structured Masked Representation and State Space Duality
full.secZh: 2.3 结构化掩码表示与状态空间对偶性

items.en: Mamba-2 showed that a large class of SSMs admit a matrix form that vectorizes the time-step recurrence. Through the state space duality (SSD) framework, recurrent SSMs can be represented within a parallel form that incorporates an element-wise mask to model the state-transition decay.
items.zh: Mamba-2 表明，一大类 SSM 可以接受矩阵形式，将时间步递推向量化。通过状态空间对偶（SSD）框架，循环 SSM 可以在并行形式中表示，该形式包含一个逐元素掩码来建模状态转移衰减。

items.en: SSD provides a general framework for a duality between linear recurrence and parallelizable (matrix-multiplication-based) computational forms
items.zh: SSD 为线性递推与可并行化（基于矩阵乘法）计算形式之间的对偶性提供了一个通用框架。

items.en: where 𝑳∈ℝT×T{\bm{L}}\in\mathbb{R}^{T\times T} is a structured mask, 𝑩,𝑪∈ℝT×N{\bm{B}},{\bm{C}}\in\mathbb{R}^{T\times N}, 𝑿∈ℝT×D{\bm{X}}\in\mathbb{R}^{T\times D} are the inputs to the SSM and 𝒀∈ℝT×D{\bm{Y}}\in\mathbb{R}^{T\times D} is its output. Different structures on 𝑳{\bm{L}} give rise to various instantiations of SSD.
items.zh: 其中 𝑳∈ℝT×T{\bm{L}}\in\mathbb{R}^{T\times T} 是一个结构化掩码，𝑩,𝑪∈ℝT×N{\bm{B}},{\bm{C}}\in\mathbb{R}^{T\times N}，𝑿∈ℝT×D{\bm{X}}\in\mathbb{R}^{T\times D} 是 SSM 的输入，𝒀∈ℝT×D{\bm{Y}}\in\mathbb{R}^{T\times D} 是其输出。𝑳{\bm{L}} 的不同结构产生了 SSD 的各种实例。

items.en: Equation (2) also draws a general connection between recurrence and attention, by setting 𝑸≔𝑪{\bm{Q}}\coloneqq{\bm{C}}, 𝑲≔𝑩{\bm{K}}\coloneqq{\bm{B}}, 𝑽≔𝑿{\bm{V}}\coloneqq{\bm{X}} and viewing 𝑳{\bm{L}} as a data-dependent mask. In fact, the simplest case of SSD is (causal) linear attention [linearattention], where 𝑳{\bm{L}} is the causal triangular mask.
items.zh: 方程 (2) 还通过设置 𝑸≔𝑪{\bm{Q}}\coloneqq{\bm{C}}，𝑲≔𝑩{\bm{K}}\coloneqq{\bm{B}}，𝑽≔𝑿{\bm{V}}\coloneqq{\bm{X}} 并将 𝑳{\bm{L}} 视为数据依赖掩码，建立了循环与注意力机制之间的通用联系。实际上，SSD 的最简单情况是（因果）线性注意力 [linearattention]，其中 𝑳{\bm{L}} 是因果三角掩码。

In this paper, 𝑩t{\bm{B}}_{t} represents the continuous parameter, whereas in Mamba-2, 𝑩t{\bm{B}}_{t} represents the discretized parameter which is equivalent to γt​𝑩t\gamma_{t}{\bm{B}}_{t}.
items.zh: 由方程 (1) 中的项 αt,γt\alpha_{t},\gamma_{t} 组成。222 在原始 Mamba-2 论文中，γ\gamma 没有出现，因为它被视为折叠到 𝑩{\bm{B}} 项中。在本文中，𝑩t{\bm{B}}_{t} 表示连续参数，而在 Mamba-2 中，𝑩t{\bm{B}}_{t} 表示离散化参数，等价于 γt​𝑩t\gamma_{t}{\bm{B}}_{t}。

items.en: In Section˜3.1.3, we show that Mamba-3 is a generalization of Mamba-2 with a more expressive 𝑳{\bm{L}}, and hence also an instance of SSD.
items.zh: 在第 3.1.3 节中，我们展示了 Mamba-3 是 Mamba-2 的推广，具有更具表达力的 𝑳{\bm{L}}，因此也是 SSD 的一个实例。

items.en: We introduce Mamba-3, a state space model with three new innovations: “exponential-trapezoidal” discretization for more expressive dynamics (Section˜3.1), complex-valued state spaces for state tracking (Section˜3.2), and multi-input multi-output (MIMO) to improve modeling power and inference-time hardware utilization (Section˜3.3). These advances address the quality, capability, and efficiency limitations of current sub-quadratic architectures. We combine these together into an updated Mamba architecture block in Section˜3.4.
items.zh: 我们引入了 Mamba-3，这是一种状态空间模型，具有三项新创新：“指数-梯形”离散化以实现更具表达力的动力学（第 3.1 节），复数值状态空间以实现状态跟踪（第 3.2 节），以及多输入多输出（MIMO）以提高建模能力和推理时的硬件利用率（第 3.3 节）。这些进展解决了当前次二次架构在质量、能力和效率方面的局限性。我们在第 3.4 节中将它们组合成一个更新的 Mamba 架构块。

items.en: Structured SSMs are naturally defined as continuous-time dynamical systems that map input functions, x​(t)∈ℝx(t)\in\mathbb{R}, to output functions, y​(t)∈ℝy(t)\in\mathbb{R}, for time t>0t>0. The underlying continuous state space system is defined by a first-order ordinary differential equation (ODE) for the state 𝒉˙​(t)\dot{{\bm{h}}}(t) and an algebraic equation for the output y​(t)y(t). In sequence modeling, however, the data is only observed at discrete time steps, which then requires applying a discretization step to the SSM to transform its continuous-time dynamics into a discrete recurrence.
items.zh: 结构化 SSM 自然被定义为连续时间动力系统，将输入函数 x​(t)∈ℝx(t)\in\mathbb{R} 映射到输出函数 y​(t)∈ℝy(t)\in\mathbb{R}，对于时间 t>0t>0。底层连续状态空间系统由状态 𝒉˙​(t)\dot{{\bm{h}}}(t) 的一阶常微分方程（ODE）和输出 y​(t)y(t) 的代数方程定义。然而，在序列建模中，数据仅在离散时间步上被观测到，这需要对 SSM 应用离散化步骤，将其连续时间动力学转换为离散循环。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Left: The structured mask induced by the exponential-trapezoidal rule (Section˜3.1) is a product of the decay and two-band convolutional mask. Right: Euler (hold endpoint) versus Trapezoidal (average endpoints) integral approximation.
items.capZh: 图 1：左：指数-梯形规则（第 3.1 节）诱导的结构化掩码是衰减掩码和双带卷积掩码的乘积。右：欧拉（保持端点）与梯形（平均端点）积分近似。

items.en: Discretization methods are well-studied in classical control theory with several canonical formulas used in earlier SSM works in deep learning [S4, S4D, S5]. These mechanisms were traditionally stated and applied to linear-time invariant (LTI) systems, and their derivations do not directly apply to linear-time varying (LTV) systems. Additionally, while Mamba-1 adapted the zero-order hold (ZOH) method to LTV systems without proof, the complexity associated with selective SSMs prompted the use of an additional heuristic approximation that lacked theoretical justification and did not correspond to any established discretization technique. In the following subsection, we formalize the previous heuristics used in current LTV SSMs through our discretization framework and utilize it to propose a more expressive discretization scheme.
items.zh: 离散化方法在经典控制理论中得到了充分研究，早期 SSM 工作 [S4, S4D, S5] 中使用了几个规范公式。这些机制传统上针对线性时不变（LTI）系统进行陈述和应用，其推导不直接适用于线性时变（LTV）系统。此外，虽然 Mamba-1 将零阶保持（ZOH）方法改编为 LTV 系统而未提供证明，但与选择性 SSM 相关的复杂性促使使用了额外的启发式近似，该近似缺乏理论依据，且不对应于任何已建立的离散化技术。在以下小节中，我们通过我们的离散化框架形式化了当前 LTV SSM 中使用的先前启发式方法，并利用它提出了一种更具表达力的离散化方案。

items.en: We introduce a simple derivation that leads to a class of new discretization methods for LTV state space models. The method can be instantiated in various ways; we show that one instantiation results in the heuristic used in Mamba-1/2, thereby theoretically justifying it (exponential-Euler). We also introduce a more powerful discretization (exponential-trapezoidal) used in Mamba-3.
items.zh: 我们引入了一个简单的推导，导致了一类新的 LTV 状态空间模型离散化方法。该方法可以以多种方式实例化；我们展示了一种实例化结果即为 Mamba-1/2 中使用的启发式方法，从而在理论上证明了其合理性（指数-欧拉）。我们还引入了一种更强大的离散化方法（指数-梯形），用于 Mamba-3。

items.en: The high-level intuition of our derivation originates from the closed form solution x​(t)=et​A​x​(0)x(t)=e^{tA}x(0) of a simple linear ODE x′​(t)=A​x​(t)x^{\prime}(t)=Ax(t), which discretizes to xt+1=eΔ​A​xtx_{t+1}=e^{\Delta A}x_{t}. In this example, the exponential dominates the dynamics of the underlying first-order ODE, resulting in imprecise approximations when using low-order methods without significantly constraining Δ\Delta. Thus, we analyze the dynamics of the exponential-adjusted system e−A​t​x​(t)e^{-At}x(t). The adjusted system yields a discrete recurrent form where the state-transition and the state-input integrals are approximated separately—the state-transition integral is approximated by a right-hand approximation, i.e. A​(s)≔A​(τt)A(s)\coloneqq A(\tau_{t}) for all s∈[τt−1,τt]s\in[\tau_{t-1},\tau_{t}], yielding,
items.zh: 我们推导的高层直觉源于简单线性 ODE x′​(t)=A​x​(t)x^{\prime}(t)=Ax(t) 的闭式解 x​(t)=et​A​x​(0)x(t)=e^{tA}x(0)，该解离散化为 xt+1=eΔ​A​xtx_{t+1}=e^{\Delta A}x_{t}。在此例中，指数主导了底层一阶 ODE 的动力学，导致在不显著约束 Δ\Delta 的情况下使用低阶方法时近似不精确。因此，我们分析了指数调整系统 e−A​t​x​(t)e^{-At}x(t) 的动力学。调整后的系统产生了一种离散循环形式，其中状态转移积分和状态输入积分分别近似——状态转移积分通过右端点近似，即对于所有 s∈[τt−1,τt]s\in[\tau_{t-1},\tau_{t}]，A​(s)≔A​(τt)A(s)\coloneqq A(\tau_{t})，得到：

items.en: which serves as the foundation for further discretization techniques for the state-input integral. The full derivation is detailed in Appendix˜A.
items.zh: 这为进一步的状态输入积分离散化技术奠定了基础。完整推导详见附录 A。

items.en: The classical zero-order hold discretization method can be derived from the foundation above with a specific approximation of the right-hand side integral. By treating At,𝑩​(τ),x​(τ)A_{t},{\bm{B}}(\tau),x(\tau) as constants over the interval [τt−1,τt][\tau_{t-1},\tau_{t}] where the values are fixed to the right endpoint τt\tau_{t}, the integral results in At−1​(exp⁡(Δt​At)−I)​𝑩t​xtA_{t}^{-1}\,\left(\exp(\Delta_{t}A_{t})-I\right){\bm{B}}_{t}x_{t}.
items.zh: 经典的零阶保持离散化方法可以从上述基础通过右端积分的特定近似推导出来。通过将 At,𝑩​(τ),x​(τ)A_{t},{\bm{B}}(\tau),x(\tau) 在区间 [τt−1,τt][\tau_{t-1},\tau_{t}] 上视为常数，且值固定为右端点 τt\tau_{t}，积分结果为 At−1​(exp⁡(Δt​At)−I)​𝑩t​xtA_{t}^{-1}\,\left(\exp(\Delta_{t}A_{t})-I\right){\bm{B}}_{t}x_{t}。

items.en: We note that this formally proves that the classical ZOH formula for LTI systems applies to LTV by naively replacing the parameters A,B,ΔA,B,\Delta with their time-varying ones.
items.zh: 我们注意到，这正式证明了 LTI 系统的经典 ZOH 公式适用于 LTV，只需将参数 A,B,ΔA,B,\Delta 替换为其时变版本。

items.en: While Mamba-1 stated to use the time-varying ZOH formula above, Mamba-1 and Mamba-2 actually used an additional approximation in the released implementation. This discretization can be recovered by approximating the state-input integral with Euler’s rule [Süli_Mayers_2003] and holding the (right) endpoint constant throughout the interval (Fig. 1)
items.zh: 虽然 Mamba-1 声称使用了上述时变 ZOH 公式，但 Mamba-1 和 Mamba-2 在发布的实现中实际上使用了额外的近似。这种离散化可以通过使用欧拉规则 [Süli_Mayers_2003] 近似状态输入积分并在整个区间内保持（右）端点恒定来恢复（图 1）。

items.en: We call equation (4) the exponential-Euler discretization method, stemming from the exponential integration followed by Euler approximation. This derivation justifies the formulas used in Mamba-1/-2’s implementation.
items.zh: 我们将方程 (4) 称为指数-欧拉离散化方法，源于指数积分后跟欧拉近似。该推导证明了 Mamba-1/-2 实现中使用的公式的合理性。

items.en: However, Euler’s rule provides only a first-order approximation of the state-input integral and its local truncation error scales as O​(Δt2)O(\Delta_{t}^{2}). In contrast, we introduce a generalized trapezoidal rule, which provides a second-order accurate approximation of the integral, offering improved accuracy over Euler’s rule. Specifically, it approximates the integral with a data-dependent, convex combination of both interval endpoints. This generalization extends the classical trapezoidal rule [Süli_Mayers_2003], which simply averages the interval endpoints (Figure˜1).
items.zh: 然而，欧拉规则仅提供状态输入积分的一阶近似，其局部截断误差为 O​(Δt2)O(\Delta_{t}^{2})。相比之下，我们引入了一种广义梯形规则，它提供了积分的二阶精确近似，比欧拉规则具有更高的精度。具体来说，它使用数据依赖的凸组合来近似两个区间端点的积分。这种推广扩展了经典的梯形规则 [Süli_Mayers_2003]，后者简单地平均区间端点（图 1）。

items.zh: [指数-梯形离散化] 命题 PropTrap 通过广义梯形规则近似方程 (16) 中的状态输入积分，得到循环：

items.en: where λt∈[0,1]\lambda_{t}\in[0,1] is a data-dependent scalar, αt≔eΔt​At\alpha_{t}\coloneqq e^{\Delta_{t}A_{t}}, βt≔(1−λt)​Δt​eΔt​At\beta_{t}\coloneqq(1-\lambda_{t})\Delta_{t}e^{\Delta_{t}A_{t}}, γt≔λt​Δt\gamma_{t}\coloneqq\lambda_{t}\Delta_{t}.
items.zh: 其中 λt∈[0,1]\lambda_{t}\in[0,1] 是一个数据依赖的标量，αt≔eΔt​At\alpha_{t}\coloneqq e^{\Delta_{t}A_{t}}，βt≔(1−λt)​Δt​eΔt​At\beta_{t}\coloneqq(1-\lambda_{t})\Delta_{t}e^{\Delta_{t}A_{t}}，γt≔λt​Δt\gamma_{t}\coloneqq\lambda_{t}\Delta_{t}。

items.en: The exponential-trapezoidal rule is a generalization of (a) the classical trapezoid rule, which is recovered when λt=12\lambda_{t}=\tfrac{1}{2}, and (b) Mamba-2’s Euler’s rule, which is recovered when λt=1\lambda_{t}=1.
items.zh: 指数-梯形规则是 (a) 经典梯形规则的推广，当 λt=12\lambda_{t}=\tfrac{1}{2} 时恢复，以及 (b) Mamba-2 的欧拉规则的推广，当 λt=1\lambda_{t}=1 时恢复。

items.en: This is a second-order discretization of the state-input integral and its error scales as O​(Δt3)O(\Delta_{t}^{3}) under standard stability assumptions, provided that the trapezoidal parameter satisfies λt=12+O​(Δt)\lambda_{t}=\tfrac{1}{2}+O(\Delta_{t}). However, our ablations indicate that not enforcing this constraint is better for empirical performance. See Appendix A.2 and A.3 for details.
items.zh: 这是状态输入积分的二阶离散化，在标准稳定性假设下，其误差为 O​(Δt3)O(\Delta_{t}^{3})，前提是梯形参数满足 λt=12+O​(Δt)\lambda_{t}=\tfrac{1}{2}+O(\Delta_{t})。然而，我们的消融实验表明，不强制执行此约束对经验性能更好。详见附录 A.2 和 A.3。

items.en: Our new discretization framework and the two instantiations, exponential-Euler and exponential-trapezoidal, are, to the best of our knowledge, novel for structured SSMs used in deep learning. Table˜1 compares and summarizes canonical and commonly used discretization schemes for state space models.
items.zh: 据我们所知，我们的新离散化框架及其两个实例——指数-欧拉和指数-梯形——对于深度学习中使用结构化状态空间模型来说是新颖的。表 1 比较并总结了状态空间模型的经典和常用离散化方案。

items.en: Our generalized exponential-trapezoidal discretization is equivalent to applying a data-dependent convolution of size two on the state-input to the SSM. In particular, a normal SSM in recurrent form materializes the state-input 𝒗t=𝑩t​xt{\bm{v}}_{t}={\bm{B}}_{t}x_{t}, then computes a linear recurrence 𝒉t=αt​𝒉t−1+γt​𝒗t{\bm{h}}_{t}=\alpha_{t}{\bm{h}}_{t-1}+\gamma_{t}{\bm{v}}_{t}. In equation (6) we instead first apply a width-2 convolution on 𝒗t{\bm{v}}_{t} (weighted by β,γ\beta,\gamma) before passing it into the linear recurrence.
items.zh: 我们广义的指数-梯形离散化等价于对 SSM 的状态输入应用一个大小为 2 的数据相关卷积。具体来说，一个普通的 SSM 以循环形式实现状态输入 ${\bm{v}}_{t}={\bm{B}}_{t}x_{t}$，然后计算线性循环 ${\bm{h}}_{t}=\alpha_{t}{\bm{h}}_{t-1}+\gamma_{t}{\bm{v}}_{t}$。在公式(6)中，我们首先对 ${\bm{v}}_{t}$ 应用一个宽度为 2 的卷积（由 $\beta,\gamma$ 加权），然后再将其传入线性循环。

items.en: There is a distinct difference between the “convolution” induced by exponential-trapezoidal discretization and the standard short convolutions used by sequence models such as Mamba and GDN. Standard short convolutions are independent operations applied on xtx_{t} (and often 𝑩t,𝑪t{\bm{B}}_{t},{\bm{C}}_{t}) outside the core recurrence, while our new discretization can be interpreted as a convolution on the state-input 𝑩t​xt{\bm{B}}_{t}x_{t} within the core recurrence.
items.zh: 指数-梯形离散化所引发的“卷积”与 Mamba 和 GDN 等序列模型使用的标准短卷积之间存在明显区别。标准短卷积是在核心循环之外对 $x_{t}$（通常还有 ${\bm{B}}_{t},{\bm{C}}_{t}$）应用的独立操作，而我们的新离散化可以解释为在核心循环内对状态输入 ${\bm{B}}_{t}x_{t}$ 的卷积。

items.en: Our new recurrence can be instantiated as a case of SSD and has a corresponding parallel form to equation (2). Expanding the state recurrence from 𝒉0=γ0​𝑩0​x0{\bm{h}}_{0}=\gamma_{0}{\bm{B}}_{0}x_{0} results in 𝒉T=αT​⋯​2​(γ0​α1+β1)​𝑩0​x0+⋯+γT​𝑩T​xT{\bm{h}}_{T}=\alpha_{T\cdots 2}(\gamma_{0}\alpha_{1}+\beta_{1}){\bm{B}}_{0}x_{0}+\cdots+\gamma_{T}{\bm{B}}_{T}x_{T}, where the SSM output is 𝒚T=αT​⋯​2​(γ0​α1+β1)​𝑪T⊤​𝑩0​x0+⋯+γT​𝑪T⊤​𝑩T​xT{\bm{y}}_{T}=\alpha_{T\cdots 2}(\gamma_{0}\alpha_{1}+\beta_{1}){\bm{C}}_{T}^{\top}{\bm{B}}_{0}x_{0}+\cdots+\gamma_{T}{\bm{C}}_{T}^{\top}{\bm{B}}_{T}x_{T}. Unrolling these rows shows that the mask induced by the trapezoidal update is no longer a fixed averaging of endpoints (as in the classical trapezoid rule), but a data-dependent convex combination of the two interval endpoints.
items.zh: 我们的新循环可以实例化为 SSD 的一种情况，并具有与公式(2)对应的并行形式。从 ${\bm{h}}_{0}=\gamma_{0}{\bm{B}}_{0}x_{0}$ 展开状态循环得到 ${\bm{h}}_{T}=\alpha_{T\cdots 2}(\gamma_{0}\alpha_{1}+\beta_{1}){\bm{B}}_{0}x_{0}+\cdots+\gamma_{T}{\bm{B}}_{T}x_{T}$，其中 SSM 输出为 ${\bm{y}}_{T}=\alpha_{T\cdots 2}(\gamma_{0}\alpha_{1}+\beta_{1}){\bm{C}}_{T}^{\top}{\bm{B}}_{0}x_{0}+\cdots+\gamma_{T}{\bm{C}}_{T}^{\top}{\bm{B}}_{T}x_{T}$。展开这些行表明，梯形更新引入的掩码不再是端点的固定平均（如经典梯形规则），而是两个区间端点的数据相关凸组合。

items.en: Under the SSD framework (2) with parallel form 𝒀=(𝑳⊙𝑪​𝑩⊤)​𝑿{\bm{Y}}=({\bm{L}}\odot{\bm{C}}{{\bm{B}}}^{\top}){\bm{X}}, Mamba-3 corresponds to a mask 𝑳{\bm{L}} whose structure is a 1-semiseparable matrix composed with a 2-band matrix:444Incidentally, this is a special case of a 2-semiseparable matrix.
items.zh: 在具有并行形式 ${\bm{Y}}=({\bm{L}}\odot{\bm{C}}{\bm{B}}^{\top}){\bm{X}}$ 的 SSD 框架(2)下，Mamba-3 对应一个掩码 ${\bm{L}}$，其结构是一个 1-半可分离矩阵与一个 2-带状矩阵的复合：444 顺便提一下，这是 2-半可分离矩阵的一个特例。

items.en: This parallel formulation enables the hardware-efficient matmul-focused calculation of the SSM output for training.
items.zh: 这种并行公式使得训练时 SSM 输出的硬件高效矩阵乘法计算成为可能。

items.en: We note that the convolutional connection of Mamba-3 can also be seen through this parallel dual form, where multiplication by the 2-band matrix in equation (7) represents convolution with weights β,γ\beta,\gamma. In Section˜A.1, we use the SSD tensor contraction machinery to prove that the parallel form is equivalent to a vanilla SSM with a state-input convolution.
items.zh: 我们注意到，Mamba-3 的卷积连接也可以通过这种并行对偶形式看出，其中公式(7)中与 2-带状矩阵的乘法表示权重为 $\beta,\gamma$ 的卷积。在 A.1 节中，我们使用 SSD 张量收缩机制证明并行形式等价于具有状态输入卷积的普通 SSM。

items.en: The structured mask of Mamba-3 can be viewed as generalizing Mamba-2, which instead of the 2-band matrix has a diagonal matrix with γt\gamma_{t} only (3).
items.zh: Mamba-3 的结构化掩码可以看作是对 Mamba-2 的推广，后者不是 2-带状矩阵，而是仅包含 $\gamma_t$ 的对角矩阵(3)。

items.en: Modern SSMs are designed with efficiency as the central goal, motivated by the need to scale to larger models and longer sequences. For instance, successive architectures have progressively simplified the state-transition matrix: S4 [S4] used complex-valued Normal Plus Low Rank (NPLR) matrices, Mamba [gu2024mambalineartimesequencemodeling] reduced this to a diagonal of reals, and Mamba-2 [dao2024transformersssmsgeneralizedmodels] further simplified it to a single scaled identity matrix. Although these simplifications largely maintain language modeling performance, recent works [merrill2025illusionstatestatespacemodels, sarrof2024expressivecapacitystatespace, grazzi2025unlockingstatetrackinglinearrnns] have shown that the restriction to real, non-negative eigenvalue transitions degrades the capabilities of the model on simple state-tracking tasks—here referring primarily to the solvable-group regime (TC0\text{TC}^{0}) such as parity—which can be solved by a one-layer LSTM. This limitation, formalized in Theorem 1 of [grazzi2024mambacapableincontextlearning], arises from restricting the eigenvalues of the transition matrix to real numbers, which cannot represent “rotational” hidden state dynamics. For instance, consider the parity function on binary inputs {0,1}\{0,1\}, defined as ∑txtmod2\sum_{t}x_{t}\bmod 2. This task can be performed using update: 𝒉t=𝑹​(π​xt)​𝒉t−1{\bm{h}}_{t}={\bm{R}}(\pi x_{t}){\bm{h}}_{t-1}, where 𝑹​(⋅){\bm{R}}(\cdot) is a 2-D rotation matrix. Such rotational dynamics cannot be expressed with real eigenvalues.
items.zh: 现代 SSM 的设计以效率为核心目标，其动机是扩展到更大模型和更长序列的需求。例如，连续架构逐步简化了状态转移矩阵：S4 [S4] 使用复数值的 Normal Plus Low Rank (NPLR)矩阵，Mamba [gu2024mambalineartimesequencemodeling] 将其简化为实数对角矩阵，而 Mamba-2 [dao2024transformersssmsgeneralizedmodels] 进一步简化为单个缩放单位矩阵。尽管这些简化在很大程度上保持了语言建模性能，但最近的工作 [merrill2025illusionstatestatespacemodels, sarrof2024expressivecapacitystatespace, grazzi2025unlockingstatetrackinglinearrnns] 表明，限制为实数非负特征值转移会降低模型在简单状态跟踪任务上的能力——这里主要指可解群体制（$\text{TC}^{0}$）如奇偶性——而这些问题可以通过单层 LSTM 解决。这种局限性在 [grazzi2024mambacapableincontextlearning] 的定理 1 中形式化，源于将转移矩阵的特征值限制为实数，这无法表示“旋转”隐藏状态动态。例如，考虑二进制输入 $\{0,1\}$ 上的奇偶函数，定义为 $\sum_{t}x_{t}\bmod 2$。该任务可以通过更新 ${\bm{h}}_{t}={\bm{R}}(\pi x_{t}){\bm{h}}_{t-1}$ 执行，其中 ${\bm{R}}(\cdot)$ 是一个二维旋转矩阵。这种旋转动态无法用实数特征值表示。

items.en: To recover this capability, we begin with complex SSMs (8), which are capable of representing state-tracking dynamics. We show that, under discretization (Appendix˜A), complex SSMs can be formulated as real SSMs with a block-diagonal transition matrix composed of 2×22\times 2 rotation matrices (Section˜3.2.1). We then show that this is equivalent to applying data-dependent rotary embeddings on both the input and output projections 𝑩,𝑪{\bm{B}},{\bm{C}} respectively. This result establishes a theoretical connection between complex SSMs and data-dependent RoPE embeddings (Section˜3.2.1). Finally, the “RoPE trick” used in [su2023roformerenhancedtransformerrotary] allows for an efficient implementation of complex-valued state-transition matrices with minimal computational overhead compared to real-valued SSMs.
items.zh: 为了恢复这种能力，我们从复数 SSM(8)开始，它能够表示状态跟踪动态。我们证明，在离散化（附录 A）下，复数 SSM 可以表述为具有由 $2\times 2$ 旋转矩阵组成的块对角转移矩阵的实数 SSM（第 3.2.1 节）。然后我们证明，这等价于在输入和输出投影 ${\bm{B}},{\bm{C}}$ 上分别应用数据相关旋转嵌入。这一结果建立了复数 SSM 与数据相关 RoPE 嵌入之间的理论联系（第 3.2.1 节）。最后，[su2023roformerenhancedtransformerrotary] 中使用的“RoPE 技巧”允许高效实现复数值状态转移矩阵，与实数值 SSM 相比计算开销极小。

items.en: To observe the connection of complex SSMs to RoPE embeddings, note that in the above proposition, the data-dependent rotations 𝑹i{\bm{R}}_{i} are aggregated across time-steps and applied to 𝑪,𝑩{\bm{C}},{\bm{B}}, which, by the state space duality framework, correspond to the query (𝑸{\bm{Q}}) and key (𝑲{\bm{K}}) components of attention (Section˜2.3). Analogously, vanilla RoPE [su2023roformerenhancedtransformerrotary] applies data-independent rotation matrices, where the rotation angles follow a fixed frequency schedule 𝜽​[i]=10000−2​i/N\bm{\theta}[i]=10000^{-2i/N}.
items.zh: 为了观察复数 SSM 与 RoPE 嵌入的联系，注意在上述命题中，数据相关旋转 ${\bm{R}}_{i}$ 跨时间步聚合并应用于 ${\bm{C}},{\bm{B}}$，根据状态空间对偶框架，这对应于注意力机制的查询（${\bm{Q}}$）和键（${\bm{K}}$）分量（第 2.3 节）。类似地，普通 RoPE [su2023roformerenhancedtransformerrotary] 应用数据无关的旋转矩阵，其中旋转角度遵循固定频率调度 $\bm{\theta}[i]=10000^{-2i/N}$。
