items.en: We empirically validate that our complex SSM, implemented via data-dependent RoPE, is capable of solving state-tracking tasks that real-valued SSMs with and without standard RoPE cannot (Table˜5(b)), supporting theoretical claims.
items.zh: 我们通过实验验证，我们的复数 SSM 通过数据相关的 RoPE 实现，能够解决实值 SSM（无论是否使用标准 RoPE）无法解决的状态跟踪任务（表 5(b)），支持了理论主张。

items.en: Scaling test-time compute has opened new frontiers in model capability, such as agentic workflows, where inference takes up an increasing share of the overall compute budget. This has placed a renewed focus on inference efficiency of language models and spurred the adoption of SSMs and sub-quadratic layers which feature fixed-sized hidden states and thus offer lower compute and memory requirements. Although these new layers have a lower wall-clock time compared to Transformers, their decoding is heavily memory-bound, resulting in low hardware utilization. In this section, we use the SSM perspective to introduce a methodological refinement to the Mamba-3 recurrence that allows for increased model FLOPs without increasing decoding wall-clock time, resulting in a better model with the same decoding speed.
items.zh: 扩展测试时算力为模型能力开辟了新的前沿，例如智能体式工作流，其中推理在总算力预算中占据越来越大的份额。这重新聚焦于语言模型的推理效率，并推动了 SSM 和次二次层的采用，这些层具有固定大小的隐藏状态，因此提供更低的算力和内存需求。尽管这些新层相比 Transformer 具有更低的墙钟时间，但其解码严重受内存限制，导致硬件利用率低。在本节中，我们利用 SSM 视角对 Mamba-3 递归引入一种方法论改进，允许在不增加解码墙钟时间的情况下增加模型 FLOPs，从而在相同解码速度下获得更好的模型。

items.en: To improve hardware efficiency, we need to consider the arithmetic intensity of token generation, defined as FLOPs divided by the number of input-output bytes for a given op. Since SSM decoding saturates the memory bandwidth with idle compute (i.e., being memory-bound), we would like to increase its arithmetic intensity to effectively overlay compute with memory I/O. More concretely, the arithmetic intensity for a single generation in Mamba is around 2.52.5 ops per byte (Table˜2(a)), while the arithmetic intensity for bfloat16 matmul is about 295295 ops per byte for NVIDIA H100-SXM5 [nvidia_h100_2022]. Consequently, SSM decoding falls far short of a compute-bound regime, and moreover it is not clear how one can adjust the existing parameters in Mamba to mitigate the lack of hardware efficiency. We note that this observation applies generally to other sub-quadratic models, such as causal linear attention.
items.zh: 为了提高硬件效率，我们需要考虑词元生成的算术强度，定义为 FLOPs 除以给定操作的输入输出字节数。由于 SSM 解码使内存带宽饱和而算力空闲（即受内存限制），我们希望增加其算术强度，以有效将计算与内存 I/O 重叠。更具体地说，Mamba 中单次生成的算术强度约为每字节 2.5 次操作（表 2(a)），而 bfloat16 矩阵乘法的算术强度在 NVIDIA H100-SXM5 上约为每字节 295 次操作[nvidia_h100_2022]。因此，SSM 解码远未达到计算受限状态，而且不清楚如何调整 Mamba 中的现有参数以缓解硬件效率不足。我们注意到，这一观察普遍适用于其他次二次模型，如因果线性注意力。

items.en: Consider a single head of a typical SSM with head dimension PP, which involves stacking the SISO recurrence 𝒉t←αt​𝒉t−1+Δt​𝑩t​xt{\bm{h}}_{t}\leftarrow\alpha_{t}{\bm{h}}_{t-1}+\Delta_{t}{\bm{B}}_{t}x_{t} with PP copies sharing the same αt,Δt\alpha_{t},\Delta_{t} and 𝑩t{\bm{B}}_{t}. The resulting broadcasted recurrence 𝒉t←αt​𝒉t−1+Δt​𝑩t​𝒙t⊤{\bm{h}}_{t}\leftarrow\alpha_{t}{\bm{h}}_{t-1}+\Delta_{t}{\bm{B}}_{t}{\bm{x}}_{t}^{\top} takes vector inputs 𝒙t∈ℝP{\bm{x}}_{t}\in\mathbb{R}^{P} and has matrix-valued states 𝒉t∈ℝN×P{\bm{h}}_{t}\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times P}.
items.zh: 考虑一个典型 SSM 的单个头，头维度为 P，涉及将 SISO 递归𝒉t←αt𝒉t−1+Δt𝑩txt 与 P 个副本堆叠，共享相同的αt, Δt 和𝑩t。得到的广播递归𝒉t←αt𝒉t−1+Δt𝑩t𝒙t⊤接受向量输入𝒙t∈ℝP，并具有矩阵值状态𝒉t∈ℝN×P。

items.en: Note that the memory traffic (input and output size) is dominated by the state 𝒉t{\bm{h}}_{t}, while the computation mainly comprises the outer product 𝑩t​𝒙t⊤{\bm{B}}_{t}{\bm{x}}_{t}^{\top} which has FLOPs proportional to N​PNP. By increasing the dimension of the latter terms, transforming 𝑩t∈ℝN→𝑩t∈ℝN×R{\bm{B}}_{t}\in\mathbb{R}^{N}\to{\bm{B}}_{t}\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times R} and 𝒙t∈ℝP→𝒙t∈ℝP×R{\bm{x}}_{t}\in\mathbb{R}^{P}\to{\bm{x}}_{t}\in\mathbb{R}^{P\times R}, the memory traffic does not significantly increase (for small RR) while the FLOPs consumed increase by a factor of RR (Table˜2(a)). Thus, this transformation increases the arithmetic intensity of the recurrence. Furthermore, the increase in arithmetic intensity is translated into practical gains, since the outer product 𝑩t​𝒙t⊤{\bm{B}}_{t}{\bm{x}}_{t}^{\top} becomes a hardware-efficient matrix-matrix product (matmul), which is computed using fast tensor-cores, incurring only a marginal latency cost. As a result, the MIMO recurrence is more expressive than the original SISO recurrence, computing R×R{\scriptstyle\times} more FLOPs while practically preserving the decoding speed.
items.zh: 注意，内存流量（输入和输出大小）主要由状态𝒉t 决定，而计算主要包括外积𝑩t𝒙t⊤，其 FLOPs 与 NP 成正比。通过增加后者的维度，将𝑩t∈ℝN 变换为𝑩t∈ℝN×R，𝒙t∈ℝP 变换为𝒙t∈ℝP×R，内存流量不会显著增加（对于小的 R），而消耗的 FLOPs 增加了 R 倍（表 2(a)）。因此，这种变换增加了递归的算术强度。此外，算术强度的增加转化为实际收益，因为外积𝑩t𝒙t⊤变成了硬件高效的矩阵-矩阵乘积（matmul），使用快速张量核心计算，仅产生微小的延迟成本。因此，MIMO 递归比原始 SISO 递归更具表达力，计算 R×更多的 FLOPs，同时实际保持解码速度。

items.en: For similar reasons, the computation of the output from the state, 𝒚t←𝑪t⊤​𝒉t{\bm{y}}_{t}\leftarrow{\bm{C}}_{t}^{\top}{\bm{h}}_{t} acquires an extra rank RR by modifying the output projection as 𝑪t∈ℝN→𝑪t∈ℝN×R{\bm{C}}_{t}\in\mathbb{R}^{N}\to{\bm{C}}_{t}\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times R}. Overall, this transformation is equivalent to expanding the original single-input, single-output (SISO) recurrence to multi-input, multi-output (MIMO).
items.zh: 出于类似原因，从状态计算输出𝒚t←𝑪t⊤𝒉t 通过将输出投影修改为𝑪t∈ℝN→𝑪t∈ℝN×R 而获得额外的秩 R。总体而言，这种变换相当于将原始单输入单输出（SISO）递归扩展为多输入多输出（MIMO）。

items.en: While the MIMO formulation is motivated by inference efficiency, the training algorithms for SSMs (including our developments in Section˜3.1, Section˜3.2) have been typically developed for SISO models. We begin with the observation that MIMO SSMs can be expressed in terms of R2R^{2} SISO SSMs, where RR SISO SSMs sharing the same recurrence are summed for each of the RR MIMO outputs. In particular, define 𝑪t(i)∈ℝN,𝑩t(j)∈ℝN,𝒙t(j)∈ℝ,Δt∈ℝ{\bm{C}}_{t}^{(i)}\in\mathbb{R}^{N},{\bm{B}}_{t}^{(j)}\in\mathbb{R}^{N},{\bm{x}}_{t}^{(j)}\in\mathbb{R},\Delta_{t}\in\mathbb{R}, where i,j∈{0,…,R−1}i,j\in\{0,...,R-1\}, then we have,
items.zh: 虽然 MIMO 公式是出于推理效率的动机，但 SSM 的训练算法（包括我们在第 3.1 节、第 3.2 节中的进展）通常是为 SISO 模型开发的。我们首先观察到，MIMO SSM 可以用 R^2 个 SISO SSM 表示，其中 R 个共享相同递归的 SISO SSM 为每个 MIMO 输出求和。特别地，定义𝑪t(i)∈ℝN, 𝑩t(j)∈ℝN, 𝒙t(j)∈ℝ, Δt∈ℝ，其中 i,j∈{0,...,R−1}，则有：

items.en: Thus, yt(i)=∑j𝖲𝖲𝖬​(α,Δ,𝑩(j),𝑪(i),𝒙(j))ty_{t}^{(i)}=\sum_{j}\mathsf{SSM}\!\left(\alpha,\Delta,{\bm{B}}^{(j)},{\bm{C}}^{(i)},{\bm{x}}^{(j)}\right)_{t}, where 𝖲𝖲𝖬​(α,Δ,𝑩(j),𝑪(i),𝒙(j))t:=(𝑪t(i))⊤​𝒉t(j)\mathsf{SSM}\!\left(\alpha,\Delta,{\bm{B}}^{(j)},{\bm{C}}^{(i)},{\bm{x}}^{(j)}\right)_{t}:=\left({\bm{C}}_{t}^{(i)}\right)^{\top}{\bm{h}}_{t}^{(j)} with 𝒉t(j){\bm{h}}_{t}^{(j)} from (12).
items.zh: 因此，yt(i)=∑j 𝖲𝖲𝖬(α,Δ,𝑩(j),𝑪(i),𝒙(j))t，其中𝖲𝖲𝖬(α,Δ,𝑩(j),𝑪(i),𝒙(j))t:=(𝑪t(i))⊤𝒉t(j)，𝒉t(j)来自（12）。

items.en: Furthermore, improvements to standard SISO-based SSM models can be directly applied to MIMO models as the underlying SISO training algorithms can be utilized as a black-box. This observation allows a MIMO model to be trained by invoking the SISO algorithm R2R^{2} times as a black box in parallel. In contrast, when computed in the recurrent form, equation (12), (13), and (14) can be performed sequentially, incurring only an RR-times overhead relative to SISO SSMs (recall the discussion on MIMO decoding FLOPs).
items.zh: 此外，对标准 SISO SSM 模型的改进可以直接应用于 MIMO 模型，因为底层的 SISO 训练算法可以作为黑盒使用。这一观察允许通过并行调用 SISO 算法 R^2 次作为黑盒来训练 MIMO 模型。相比之下，当以递归形式计算时，方程（12）、(13)和（14）可以顺序执行，仅产生相对于 SISO SSM 的 R 倍开销（回顾关于 MIMO 解码 FLOPs 的讨论）。

items.en: Many modern SISO recurrent models, including Mamba-2, are computed using a chunked algorithm, where the sequence is divided into chunks of length CC. Within each chunk, a parallel (but asymptotically slower) algorithm is applied, while a recurrence is computed across chunks. Chunked algorithms interpolate between two extremes: a fully parallel and a fully sequential algorithm. By exploiting this structure, we can reduce the training cost of MIMO SSMs to RR times that of SISO SSMs. This idea also appears in the SSD framework—SSD applies a hardware-friendly quadratic algorithm within each chunk, while using the recurrent form across chunks, and shows that when the state and head dimensions are comparable, setting the chunk size to this dimension yields an overall linear-time algorithm. Specifically, SSD’s intra-chunk computation incurs (2​C2​N+2​C2​P)\left(2C^{2}N+2C^{2}P\right) FLOPs per chunk, giving a total of TC​(2​C2​N+2​C2​P)=2​T​C​(N+P)\frac{T}{C}\left(2C^{2}N+2C^{2}P\right)=2TC(N+P). The inter-chunk computation incurs 4​N​P​C+2​N​P4NPC+2NP FLOPs per chunk, for a total of TC​(4​N​P​C+2​N​P)=4​T​N​P+TC​2​N​P\frac{T}{C}(4NPC+2NP)=4TNP+\frac{T}{C}2NP (ignoring negligible terms). Setting C=P=NC=P=N, the total FLOP count is 8​T​N28TN^{2}, which is linear in TT.
items.zh: 许多现代 SISO 递归模型，包括 Mamba-2，使用分块算法计算，其中序列被划分为长度为 C 的块。在每个块内，应用并行（但渐近较慢）的算法，而在块之间计算递归。分块算法在两个极端之间插值：完全并行和完全顺序的算法。通过利用这种结构，我们可以将 MIMO SSM 的训练成本降低到 SISO SSM 的 R 倍。这一思想也出现在 SSD 框架中——SSD 在每个块内应用硬件友好的二次算法，同时跨块使用递归形式，并表明当状态维度和头维度相当时，将块大小设置为该维度可得到总体线性时间算法。具体来说，SSD 的块内计算每个块产生（2C^2N+2C^2P） FLOPs，总计（T/C）(2C^2N+2C^2P)=2TC(N+P)。块间计算每个块产生 4NPC+2NP FLOPs，总计（T/C）(4NPC+2NP)=4TNP+(T/C)2NP（忽略可忽略项）。设置 C=P=N，总 FLOP 计数为 8TN^2，关于 T 是线性的。

items.en: The chunked algorithm for SSD can be naturally generalized into MIMO SSMs. In such a case, the FLOP counts of state projection 𝑩​𝒙⊤{\bm{B}}{\bm{x}}^{\top} and state emission 𝑪⊤​𝒉{\bm{C}}^{\top}{\bm{h}} increase by R×R\times, while the FLOP count of the intrachunk component 𝑪⊤​𝑩{\bm{C}}^{\top}{\bm{B}} increases by R2×R^{2}\times. As a result, the intra-chunk computation incurs 2⋅(TC​(C​R)2​N+TC​(C​R)2​P)2\cdot\left(\frac{T}{C}(CR)^{2}N+\frac{T}{C}(CR)^{2}P\right) FLOPs and inter-chunk computation incurs 4⋅TC​N​P​(C​R)+2⋅TC​N​P4\cdot\frac{T}{C}NP(CR)+2\cdot\frac{T}{C}NP FLOPs. Thus, setting C​R=N=PCR=N=P yields a total FLOP count of 8​T​R​N28TRN^{2}, an RR-fold increase in FLOP count. Intuitively, setting MIMO chunk size as 1R\frac{1}{R} times the SISO chunk size, i.e., CMIMO←1R​CSISOC_{\text{MIMO}}\leftarrow\frac{1}{R}C_{\text{SISO}}, maintains the SISO intra-chunk FLOP count while increasing the number of chunks by a factor of RR, resulting in an overall RR-times increase in FLOP count instead of an R2R^{2}-times increase while keeping the algorithm hardware-friendly.
items.zh: SSD 的分块算法可以自然地推广到 MIMO SSM。在这种情况下，状态投影𝑩𝒙⊤和状态发射𝑪⊤𝒉的 FLOP 计数增加 R 倍，而块内组件𝑪⊤𝑩的 FLOP 计数增加 R^2 倍。因此，块内计算产生 2·((T/C)(CR)^2N+(T/C)(CR)^2P) FLOPs，块间计算产生 4·(T/C)NP(CR)+2·(T/C)NP FLOPs。因此，设置 CR=N=P 得到总 FLOP 计数 8TRN^2，FLOP 计数增加 R 倍。直观上，将 MIMO 块大小设置为 SISO 块大小的 1/R，即 C_MIMO←(1/R)C_SISO，保持 SISO 块内 FLOP 计数，同时块数量增加 R 倍，导致总体 FLOP 计数增加 R 倍而不是 R^2 倍，同时保持算法硬件友好。

items.en: The training speed of algorithms in practice depends on details of the kernel implementation strategy, architectural choices such as how the MIMO parameters are instantiated, and problem dimensions, but should be no more than RR times slower. Our released Triton Mamba-3 SISO kernels are roughly on par with the Triton Mamba-2 kernels, and MIMO kernels only incur a slowdown of 2×2{\scriptstyle\times} when R=4R=4, as compute latency can be parallelized with memory movement. Table˜6 benchmarks the prefill speed of various kernels which is equivalent to the forward pass of the training kernel.
items.zh: 算法在实际中的训练速度取决于内核实现策略的细节、架构选择（如 MIMO 参数如何实例化）以及问题维度，但应不超过 R 倍慢。我们发布的 Triton Mamba-3 SISO 内核大致与 Triton Mamba-2 内核相当，而 MIMO 内核在 R=4 时仅产生 2 倍的减速，因为计算延迟可以与内存移动并行化。表 6 对各种内核的预填充速度进行了基准测试，这相当于训练内核的前向传递。

items.en: Among various choices for MIMO parameterizations, Mamba-3’s approach achieves a balance that preserves the state size and number of SSMs of its SISO counterpart, while avoiding excessive growth in parameter count. The naive conversion of a SISO SSM to a rank RR MIMO SSM would incur an R×R\times increase in parameters as all projections that model the inputs to the SSM, 𝑩,𝑪,𝒙{\bm{B}},{\bm{C}},{\bm{x}}, would increase. Block-level components, such as the gate 𝒛{\bm{z}} (which so far has been ignored for simplicity) and output 𝒚{\bm{y}} projection would also be impacted. This influx in parameter count would be intractable at larger model scales. To counteract this, we make the following change. Mamba’s multi-value attention (MVA) head structure results in shared 𝑩,𝑪{\bm{B}},{\bm{C}} across heads, so these components’ projections can be directly converted to incorporate the new MIMO rank RR with only a slight increase in parameter count from D​NDN to D​N​RDNR for the entire layer (recall DD as the model dimension). However, the SSM input 𝒙t{\bm{x}}_{t}, output 𝒚t{\bm{y}}_{t}, and gate 𝒛t{\bm{z}}_{t} are unique per head and therefore dominate the parameter count. Here, directly adjusting the projections would increase the parameter count from D​PDP to D​P​RDPR for each head. Instead, we keep the original SISO projection and element-wise scale each dimension of the projected output to size RR with a learnable, data-independent vector, resulting in D​P+P​RDP+PR parameters for each head. This mitigates the multiplicative increase to a more reasonable additive parameter count increase. Appendix˜C details the parameterization, and all MIMO-variants in our paper are parameter-matched to their SISO counterparts by reducing the MLP width.
items.zh: 在各种 MIMO 参数化选择中，Mamba-3 的方法实现了平衡，保持了其 SISO 对应物的状态大小和 SSM 数量，同时避免了参数数量的过度增长。将 SISO SSM 朴素转换为秩 R 的 MIMO SSM 会导致参数增加 R 倍，因为所有对 SSM 输入进行建模的投影𝑩, 𝑪, 𝒙都会增加。块级组件，如门控𝒛（为简单起见至今忽略）和输出𝒚投影也会受到影响。这种参数数量的激增在更大模型规模下将难以处理。为了抵消这一点，我们做出以下更改。Mamba 的多值注意力（MVA）头结构导致𝑩, 𝑪在头之间共享，因此这些组件的投影可以直接转换以纳入新的 MIMO 秩 R，整个层的参数仅从 DN 略微增加到 DNR（回忆 D 为模型维度）。然而，SSM 输入𝒙t、输出𝒚t 和门控𝒛t 每个头是唯一的，因此主导参数数量。这里，直接调整投影会导致每个头的参数从 DP 增加到 DPR。相反，我们保留原始 SISO 投影，并对投影输出的每个维度进行逐元素缩放至大小 R，使用可学习的、数据无关的向量，每个头产生 DP+PR 个参数。这将乘法增加缓解为更合理的加法参数数量增加。附录 C 详细说明了参数化，我们论文中的所有 MIMO 变体通过减少 MLP 宽度与其 SISO 对应物参数匹配。

items.en: For simplicity, all discussion in this section was for simpler 2-term recurrences such as that arising from exponential-Euler discretization; the generalization to the 3-term exponential-trapezoidal recurrence is similar.
items.zh: 为简单起见，本节中的所有讨论都是针对更简单的 2 项递归，例如由指数-欧拉离散化产生的递归；推广到 3 项指数-梯形递归是类似的。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Contrasting Mamba-2 and Mamba-3 Architectures: Key updates include exponential-trapezoidal discretization, data-dependent RoPE embeddings, MIMO projections, QK normalization, and learnable biases.
items.capZh: 图 2：对比 Mamba-2 和 Mamba-3 架构：关键更新包括指数-梯形离散化、数据相关的 RoPE 嵌入、MIMO 投影、QK 归一化和可学习偏置。

items.en: The overall architecture follows Llama [grattafiori2024llama3herdmodels], alternating Mamba-3 and SwiGLU blocks with pre-norm. The Mamba-3 block retains the overall layout of its predecessor, while introducing several key modifications.
items.zh: 整体架构遵循 Llama [grattafiori2024llama3herdmodels]，交替使用 Mamba-3 和 SwiGLU 块，并采用预归一化。Mamba-3 块保留了其前身的整体布局，同时引入了几个关键修改。

items.en: The SSD layer is replaced with the more expressive complex-valued exponential-trapezoidal SSM defined in Proposition 3.2.2. Mamba-3 employs the SISO SSM by default to enable fair comparisons with other SISO-like models, but its MIMO variant can be trained and deployed as a stronger alternative to baseline Mamba-3 (Table˜3). Our SSM 𝑨{\bm{A}} is complex with both real and imaginary components produced by data-dependent projections. With Figure˜2, this is partitioned into the real-valued AA and imaginary-valued Θ\Theta; the former is passed into the SSD black box as in Mamba-2, while the latter is computed through the RoPE trick.
items.zh: SSD 层被替换为命题 3.2.2 中定义的更具表达力的复值指数-梯形 SSM。Mamba-3 默认使用 SISO SSM，以便与其他类似 SISO 的模型进行公平比较，但其 MIMO 变体可以作为基线 Mamba-3 的更强替代方案进行训练和部署（表 3）。我们的 SSM 𝑨是复数的，其实部和虚部均由数据相关的投影产生。在图 2 中，这被划分为实值 A 和虚值Θ；前者像 Mamba-2 一样传入 SSD 黑盒，而后者通过 RoPE 技巧计算。

items.en: RMS normalizations are added following the 𝑩,𝑪{\bm{B}},{\bm{C}} projection, mirroring the QKNorm commonly used in modern Transformers [henry2020querykeynormalizationtransformers, wortsman2023smallscaleproxieslargescaletransformer] and other recent linear models [yang2025gateddeltanetworksimproving, hu2025combaimprovingbilinearrnns]. We call this either BC normalization (BCNorm) or QK normalization (QKNorm) interchangeably. We find that BCNorm is also able to stabilize large-scale runs, resulting in the removal of the post-gate RMSNorm layer (introduced in Mamba-2 for stability) in our pure Mamba-3 models. However, in hybrid models, the removed RMSNorm layer is crucial for long-context extrapolation (Table˜4).
items.zh: 在𝑩, 𝑪投影之后添加 RMS 归一化，类似于现代 Transformer [henry2020querykeynormalizationtransformers, wortsman2023smallscaleproxieslargescaletransformer]和其他近期线性模型 [yang2025gateddeltanetworksimproving, hu2025combaimprovingbilinearrnns]中常用的 QKNorm。我们将其称为 BC 归一化（BCNorm）或 QK 归一化（QKNorm），两者可互换。我们发现 BCNorm 也能稳定大规模运行，从而在我们的纯 Mamba-3 模型中移除了后门控 RMSNorm 层（Mamba-2 中为稳定性引入）。然而，在混合模型中，移除的 RMSNorm 层对于长上下文外推至关重要（表 4）。

items.en: Similarly to [yu2025blockbiasedmamba], which proved that adding channel-specific biases to 𝑩{\bm{B}} in a blockwise variant of Mamba-1 grants universal approximation capabilities, Mamba-3 incorporates learnable, head-specific, channel-wise biases into the 𝑩{\bm{B}} and 𝑪{\bm{C}} components after the BCNorm.
items.zh: 类似于[yu2025blockbiasedmamba]，该文证明在 Mamba-1 的块变体中向𝑩添加通道特定偏置可赋予通用逼近能力，Mamba-3 在 BCNorm 之后将可学习的、头特定的、通道级偏置纳入𝑩和𝑪组件。

items.en: We hypothesize that these biases also induce a convolution-like behavior in the model. Specifically, adding biases to 𝑩{\bm{B}} and 𝑪{\bm{C}} introduces data-independent components into SSMs that function more similarly to convolutions. Ablations on the bias parameterization are located in Appendix˜F.
items.zh: 我们假设这些偏置也会在模型中引发类似卷积的行为。具体来说，向 𝑩 和 𝑪 添加偏置会在 SSM 中引入与卷积更相似的数据无关组件。关于偏置参数化的消融实验见附录 F。

items.en: The combination of data-independent bias parameters, together with exponential-trapezoidal discretization (which itself induces a convolution on the state-input), is empirically able to obviate the short causal convolution and its accompanying activation function present in Mamba-2 and most modern recurrent models (Section˜4.2).
items.zh: 数据无关的偏置参数与指数梯形离散化（其本身会在状态-输入上引入卷积）的结合，在经验上能够消除 Mamba-2 及大多数现代循环模型（第 4.2 节）中存在的短因果卷积及其伴随的激活函数。

items.en: We empirically validate our SSM-centric methodological changes through the Mamba-3 model on a host of synthetic and real-world tasks. Section˜4.1 evaluates Mamba-3 on language modeling and retrieval-based tasks. Section˜4.2 ablates the effect of our new SSM components such as discretization and complex transitions. Section˜4.3 explores the inference efficiency of the Mamba-3 family and MIMO Mamba-3’s benefits over the SISO variant under fixed inference compute, and Section˜4.4 benchmarks the performance of our Mamba-3 training and inference kernels.
items.zh: 我们通过 Mamba-3 模型在一系列合成和真实世界任务上实证验证了我们以 SSM 为中心的方法论改进。第 4.1 节评估了 Mamba-3 在语言建模和基于检索的任务上的表现。第 4.2 节消融了我们的新 SSM 组件（如离散化和复数转移）的效果。第 4.3 节探讨了 Mamba-3 系列的推理效率以及 MIMO Mamba-3 在固定推理算力下相对于 SISO 变体的优势，第 4.4 节对我们的 Mamba-3 训练和推理内核进行了基准测试。

items.en: All models are pretrained with 100B tokens of the FineWeb-Edu dataset [penedo2024finewebdatasetsdecantingweb] with the Llama-3.1 tokenizer [grattafiori2024llama3herdmodels] at a 2K context length with the same standard training protocol. Training and evaluation details can be found in Appendix˜D.
items.zh: 所有模型均使用 FineWeb-Edu 数据集 [penedo2024finewebdatasetsdecantingweb] 的 100B 个 token 进行预训练，采用 Llama-3.1 分词器 [grattafiori2024llama3herdmodels]，上下文长度为 2K，并遵循相同的标准训练协议。训练和评估细节见附录 D。

items.en: Across all four model scales, Mamba-3 outperforms popular baselines at various downstream tasks (Table˜3). We highlight that Mamba-3 does not utilize the external short convolution that has been empirically identified as an important component in many performant linear models [gu2024mambalineartimesequencemodeling, yang2025gateddeltanetworksimproving, allen2025canon].
items.zh: 在所有四个模型规模上，Mamba-3 在各种下游任务中均优于流行的基线模型（表 3）。我们强调，Mamba-3 没有使用外部短卷积，而该组件在许多高性能线性模型中被经验性地认为是重要组成部分 [gu2024mambalineartimesequencemodeling, yang2025gateddeltanetworksimproving, allen2025canon]。

items.en: We aim to further verify the gain from MIMO by investigating its language-modeling capabilities by training MIMO models with rank R=4R=4 under the same settings. To ensure that the total parameter count is comparable to SISO-based models, we decrease the inner dimension of the MLP layers in MIMO models to compensate for the increase due to the MIMO projections. In the 1.5B-parameter models, for instance, the MLP inner dimension is reduced by only 6.6%6.6\%, from 4096 to 3824. See Appendix˜C for more details.
items.zh: 我们旨在通过训练在相同设置下秩 R=4 的 MIMO 模型来进一步验证 MIMO 的收益，研究其语言建模能力。为确保总参数量与基于 SISO 的模型相当，我们减小了 MIMO 模型中 MLP 层的内部维度，以补偿 MIMO 投影带来的参数增加。例如，在 1.5B 参数模型中，MLP 内部维度仅减少了 6.6%，从 4096 降至 3824。更多细节见附录 C。

items.en: On both validation perplexity and our suite of language evaluation tasks (Table˜3), we see significant gains when moving from SISO to MIMO for our Mamba-3 models. Namely, we achieve a significant perplexity gain of 0.110.11 on the 1.5B models, and Figure˜3 illustrates the downward shift in our validation loss. On the language evaluation front, we see gains on most tasks when compared to SISO, resulting in an average gain of 1.2 percentage points over SISO.
items.zh: 在验证困惑度和我们的语言评估任务套件（表 3）上，当从 SISO 转向 MIMO 时，我们的 Mamba-3 模型取得了显著收益。具体来说，在 1.5B 模型上，我们实现了 0.11 的显著困惑度提升，图 3 展示了验证损失的下降趋势。在语言评估方面，与 SISO 相比，我们在大多数任务上取得了收益，平均提升 1.2 个百分点。

items.en: Beyond standard language modeling, an important measure for linear models is their retrieval ability—how well they can recall information from earlier in the sequence [arora2025mechanisticevaluationtransformersstate, arora2025simplelinearattentionlanguage]. Unlike attention models, which can freely revisit past context with the growing KV cache, linear models must compress context into a fixed-size state. This trade-off is reflected in the Transformer baseline’s substantially stronger retrieval scores. To evaluate Mamba-3 under this lens, Table˜4 compares it against baselines on both real-world and synthetic needle-in-a-haystack (NIAH) tasks [hsieh2024rulerwhatsrealcontext], using our pretrained 1.5B models from Section˜4.1. We restrict the task sequence length to 2K tokens to match the training setup and adopt the cloze-style format for our real-world tasks to mirror the next-token-prediction objective, following [arora2025simplelinearattentionlanguage, arora2024justreadtwiceclosing].
items.zh: 除了标准语言建模，线性模型的一个重要衡量指标是其检索能力——即从序列早期回忆信息的能力 [arora2025mechanisticevaluationtransformersstate, arora2025simplelinearattentionlanguage]。与注意力模型不同，注意力模型可以通过不断增长的 KV 缓存自由地重新访问过去的上下文，而线性模型必须将上下文压缩到固定大小的状态中。这种权衡体现在 Transformer 基线模型显著更强的检索分数上。为了在此视角下评估 Mamba-3，表 4 将其与基线模型在真实世界和合成的大海捞针（NIAH）任务 [hsieh2024rulerwhatsrealcontext] 上进行了比较，使用了第 4.1 节中预训练的 1.5B 模型。我们将任务序列长度限制为 2K token 以匹配训练设置，并采用完形填空格式进行真实世界任务，以模仿下一个词预测目标，遵循 [arora2025simplelinearattentionlanguage, arora2024justreadtwiceclosing]。

items.en: Mamba-3 is competitive on real-world associative recall and question-answering (TQA, SQuAD) but struggles when extracting information from semi-structured or unstructured data (SWDE, FDA). On synthetic NIAH tasks, however, Mamba-3 surpasses or matches baselines on most cases and notably demonstrates markedly better out-of-distribution retrieval abilities than its Mamba-2 predecessor.
items.zh: Mamba-3 在真实世界的关联召回和问答（TQA, SQuAD）任务上具有竞争力，但在从半结构化或非结构化数据（SWDE, FDA）中提取信息时表现不佳。然而，在合成 NIAH 任务上，Mamba-3 在大多数情况下超越或匹配基线模型，并且显著表现出比其前身 Mamba-2 更好的分布外检索能力。

items.en: Because of the natural retrieval-based weaknesses of fixed state-size, we predict that linear layers will be predominantly used in hybrid architectures that mitigate this downside with quadratic self-attention layers. To evaluate how Mamba-3 performs within this architectural paradigm, we train our hybrid models at the same scale in an interleaving fashion with a 5:1 ratio of linear layer to NoPE self-attention [yang2025ropenopeagainnew]. As seen in prior work [waleffe2024empiricalstudymambabasedlanguage], hybrid models outperform the Transformer baseline. We find that the reintroduction of the pre-output projection RMSNorm (pre-gate, grouped RMSNorm in Table˜4) to the Mamba-3 layer improves the length generalization retrieval abilities at the slight cost of in-context, real-world retrieval tasks and is highly competitive as a linear sequence mixing backbone when mixed with self-attention. However, the ideal norm type (grouped vs default) and its placement (pre- vs post-gate) is still unclear due to competing tradeoffs (Appendix˜E, Table˜9), as we find that hybrid models and their exact characteristics and dynamics are complex and oftentimes unintuitive, a point echoed in recent works such as [cabannes2025shortwindowattentionenables].
items.zh: 由于固定状态大小在检索方面的天然弱点，我们预测线性层将主要用在混合架构中，通过二次自注意力层来缓解这一缺点。为了评估 Mamba-3 在此架构范式中的表现，我们以交错方式训练了相同规模的混合模型，线性层与无位置编码自注意力 [yang2025ropenopeagainnew] 的比例为 5:1。如先前工作 [waleffe2024empiricalstudymambabasedlanguage] 所示，混合模型优于 Transformer 基线。我们发现，在 Mamba-3 层中重新引入输出前投影 RMSNorm（表 4 中的 pre-gate, grouped RMSNorm）以略微降低上下文内真实世界检索任务为代价，提高了长度泛化检索能力，并且在与自注意力混合时，作为线性序列混合骨干具有很强的竞争力。然而，由于存在相互竞争的权衡（附录 E，表 9），理想的归一化类型（分组 vs 默认）及其位置（门控前 vs 门控后）仍不明确，我们发现混合模型及其确切特征和动态是复杂且常常反直觉的，这一点在近期工作中也有提及，如 [cabannes2025shortwindowattentionenables]。

items.en: We empirically demonstrate that data-dependent RoPE in Mamba-3 enables state tracking. Following [grazzi2025unlockingstatetrackinglinearrnns], we evaluate on tasks from the Chomsky hierarchy—Parity, Modular Arithmetic (without brackets), and Modular Arithmetic (with brackets)—and report scaled accuracies in Table˜5(b). Mamba-3 solves Parity and Modular Arithmetic (without brackets), and nearly closes the accuracy gap on Modular Arithmetic (with brackets). In contrast, Mamba-3 without RoPE, Mamba-3 with standard RoPE [su2023roformerenhancedtransformerrotary], and Mamba-2 fail to learn these tasks. We use the state-tracking-enabled variant of GDN and observe that Mamba-3 is competitive—matching parity and approaching its performance on both modular-arithmetic tasks. Experimental settings are covered in Appendix˜D.
items.zh: 我们通过实验证明，Mamba-3 中的数据依赖型 RoPE 能够实现状态跟踪。遵循 [grazzi2025unlockingstatetrackinglinearrnns]，我们在乔姆斯基层次结构的任务——奇偶性、模算术（无括号）和模算术（有括号）——上进行评估，并在表 5(b) 中报告了缩放后的准确率。Mamba-3 解决了奇偶性和模算术（无括号）问题，并几乎缩小了模算术（有括号）上的准确率差距。相比之下，没有 RoPE 的 Mamba-3、带有标准 RoPE [su2023roformerenhancedtransformerrotary] 的 Mamba-3 以及 Mamba-2 未能学会这些任务。我们使用了启用状态跟踪的 GDN 变体，并观察到 Mamba-3 具有竞争力——在奇偶性上匹配，并在两个模算术任务上接近其性能。实验设置见附录 D。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Exploration of state size (inference speed proxy) versus pretraining perplexity (performance proxy) across different Mamba variants. Mamba-3 improves the Pareto frontier compared to previous recurrent SISO models, while incorporating MIMO further shifts the frontier through better modeling performance without increasing state size.
items.capZh: 图 3：不同 Mamba 变体的状态大小（推理速度代理）与预训练困惑度（性能代理）的关系探索。Mamba-3 相比之前的循环 SISO 模型改进了帕累托前沿，而引入 MIMO 通过在不增加状态大小的情况下提供更好的建模性能，进一步推动了前沿。

items.en: As dstated_{\text{state}} governs the decode runtime for the sub-quadratic models considered in this paper (Section˜3.3), we use it as a proxy for inference speed. By plotting the validation perplexity (a proxy for model performance) as a function of dstated_{\text{state}}, we aim to formulate a holistic picture about how sub-quadratic models can trade off performance with inference speed.
items.zh: 由于 d_state 控制着本文考虑的次二次模型（第 3.3 节）的解码运行时间，我们将其用作推理速度的代理。通过绘制验证困惑度（模型性能的代理）作为 d_state 的函数，我们旨在全面了解次二次模型如何在性能与推理速度之间进行权衡。

items.en: A further downward shift is observed when moving from the SISO variant of Mamba-3 to the MIMO variant of Mamba-3 (where we set the MIMO rank R=4R=4 and decrease the MLP inner dimension to parameter match the SISO variants).
items.zh: 当从 Mamba-3 的 SISO 变体转向 MIMO 变体时（我们设置 MIMO 秩 R=4 并减小 MLP 内部维度以匹配 SISO 变体的参数），观察到进一步的向下偏移。

items.en: We expand the comparison to include the GDN baseline in Appendix˜E, Figure˜6, which also shows Mamba-3 comparing favorably to GDN.
items.zh: 我们在附录 E 图 6 中扩展了比较，包括 GDN 基线，该图也显示 Mamba-3 与 GDN 相比具有优势。

items.en: We complement Mamba-3’s methodological advances with optimized kernels that deliver fast inference in practical settings. We implement a new series of inference kernels for Mamba-3—using Triton for the forward (prefill) path and CuTe DSL for decode—and compare their per-token decode latency against the released Triton kernels for Mamba-2 and GDN in Table 6.555Details on each kernel DSL and the exact kernel fusion structure is provided in Appendix G. The evaluation measures a single decode step at batch size 128 on a single H100 for both FP32 and BF16 datatypes; models are 1.5B parameters with model dimension 20482048 and state dimension ∈{64,128}\in\{64,128\}. Across all configurations, SISO achieves the lowest latency amongst baselines. MIMO, with its higher arithmetic intensity, increases the decoding FLOPs without significantly increasing decode runtime. Our benchmarks indicate that our CuTe DSL decode implementation is competitive and that the additional components of Mamba-3 (exponential-trapezoidal update, complex-valued state, and MIMO projections) are lightweight. This supports our overall inference-first perspective: Mamba-3 admits a simple, low-latency implementation while providing strong empirical performance.
items.zh: 我们通过优化的内核补充了 Mamba-3 的方法论进步，这些内核在实际设置中提供快速推理。我们为 Mamba-3 实现了一系列新的推理内核——使用 Triton 进行前向（预填充）路径，使用 CuTe DSL 进行解码——并在表 6 中将其每 token 解码延迟与 Mamba-2 和 GDN 已发布的 Triton 内核进行了比较。每个内核 DSL 和确切内核融合结构的详细信息见附录 G。评估在单个 H100 上以批量大小 128 测量单步解码，使用 FP32 和 BF16 数据类型；模型为 1.5B 参数，模型维度 2048，状态维度 ∈{64,128}。在所有配置中，SISO 在基线中实现了最低延迟。MIMO 具有更高的算术强度，增加了解码 FLOPs，但并未显著增加解码运行时间。我们的基准测试表明，我们的 CuTe DSL 解码实现具有竞争力，并且 Mamba-3 的额外组件（指数梯形更新、复数状态和 MIMO 投影）是轻量级的。这支持了我们整体的推理优先视角：Mamba-3 在提供强大实证性能的同时，允许简单、低延迟的实现。

items.en: A growing body of work seeks to replace the quadratic softmax-based attention mechanism [vaswani2017attention, bahdanau2016neuralmachinetranslationjointly] with linear runtime alternatives. Prominent approaches can be categorized under three broad frameworks: linear attention, test-time training, and state space models.
items.zh: 越来越多的研究工作试图用线性运行时替代方案取代二次 softmax 注意力机制 [vaswani2017attention, bahdanau2016neuralmachinetranslationjointly]。主要方法可分为三大框架：线性注意力、测试时训练和状态空间模型。

items.en: Many nascent linear attention (LA) models aimed to approximate softmax attention through kernel feature maps [linearattention, performer], while recent models have discarded the feature maps for raw dot-products between queries and keys, modulated by decays or masks [sun2023retentivenetworksuccessortransformer, yang2024gatedlinearattentiontransformers]. More recently, fast-weight programmers [schlag2021deltarule] that modulate the state memory with key-value pairs have also fallen under the umbrella term “linear attention.” [yang2025gateddeltanetworksimproving, yang2025parallelizinglineartransformersdelta] originated from this line of work and enhanced traditional linear attention by replacing the additive memory update with a delta-rule recurrence. This has further spurred on a host of work improving the efficiency and capabilities of linear models built on the delta rule [kimiteam2025kimilinearexpressiveefficient, hu2025combaimprovingbilinearrnns].
items.zh: 许多新兴的线性注意力（LA）模型旨在通过核特征映射 [linearattention, performer] 近似 softmax 注意力，而最近的模型已放弃特征映射，转而使用查询和键之间的原始点积，并由衰减或掩码调制 [sun2023retentivenetworksuccessortransformer, yang2024gatedlinearattentiontransformers]。最近，用键值对调制状态记忆的快速权重编程器 [schlag2021deltarule] 也被归入“线性注意力”这一总称。[yang2025gateddeltanetworksimproving, yang2025parallelizinglineartransformersdelta] 源于这一工作线，并通过将加性记忆更新替换为 delta 规则循环，增强了传统线性注意力。这进一步激发了大量基于 delta 规则改进线性模型效率和能力的工作 [kimiteam2025kimilinearexpressiveefficient, hu2025combaimprovingbilinearrnns]。

items.en: A parallel line of test-time training (TTT) or test-time regression (TTR) work views sequence modeling as an online learning task during inference. Here, the recurrent state represents a compressed summary of past inputs, and recurrent steps update the state to memorize new information [sun2025learninglearntesttime, zhang2025testtimetrainingright, tandon2025endtoendtesttimetraininglong]. Equivalently, these methods can be viewed as optimization of a global regression objective, and recurrent state updates represent iterative optimization procedures such as variants of gradient descent [wang2025testtimeregressionunifyingframework].
items.zh: 另一条并行的测试时训练（TTT）或测试时回归（TTR）工作线将序列建模视为推理过程中的在线学习任务。在这里，循环状态代表过去输入的压缩摘要，循环步骤更新状态以记忆新信息 [sun2025learninglearntesttime, zhang2025testtimetrainingright, tandon2025endtoendtesttimetraininglong]。等价地，这些方法可以视为全局回归目标的优化，而循环状态更新代表迭代优化过程，如梯度下降的变体 [wang2025testtimeregressionunifyingframework]。

items.en: Structured state space models (SSMs) are another view of modern recurrent models inspired by classical signal processing and dynamical systems. Early versions of SSMs such as S4 [S4, S5, DSS] used linear time invariant (LTI) layers with structured state transition matrices, for example diagonal or low-rank plus diagonal, to facilitate efficient computation and stable learning of long-context tasks [S4, S5, DSS]. The introduction of time-varying, input-dependent selectivity to SSMs in Mamba-1 [gu2024mambalineartimesequencemodeling] reduced the disparity between self-attention and linear models on information-dense modalities, notably language modeling. Subsequently, Mamba-2 [dao2024transformersssmsgeneralizedmodels] formalized the connection between SSMs and (linear) attention through the structured state space duality (SSD) that we build on in this work.
items.zh: 结构化状态空间模型（SSM）是现代循环模型的另一种视角，受经典信号处理和动力系统启发。早期的 SSM 版本如 S4 [S4, S5, DSS] 使用线性时不变（LTI）层，具有结构化状态转移矩阵，例如对角或低秩加对角，以促进高效计算和长上下文任务的稳定学习 [S4, S5, DSS]。在 Mamba-1 [gu2024mambalineartimesequencemodeling] 中引入时变、输入依赖的选择性到 SSM，缩小了自注意力和线性模型在信息密集模态（尤其是语言建模）上的差距。随后，Mamba-2 [dao2024transformersssmsgeneralizedmodels] 通过结构化状态空间对偶（SSD）形式化了 SSM 与（线性）注意力之间的联系，我们在本文中以此为基础进行构建。

full.sec: 5.2 State Tracking and Complex State Space Models
full.secZh: 5.2 状态跟踪与复状态空间模型

items.en: Recent work characterizes the types of state that recurrent, constant-memory mixers can maintain, revealing algorithmic deficiencies in previous SSM-based models. [merrill2025illusionstatestatespacemodels] show that under finite precision, practical SSMs collapse to TC0\mathrm{TC}^{0}, leading to failures on tasks like permutation composition over S5S_{5} unless the primitive is extended. Similarly, [yu2025blockbiasedmamba] prove that a single-layer Mamba is not a universal approximator. Several modifications have been proposed to improve expressivity. For instance, the same work shows that a block-biased variant regains the universal approximation property with only minor changes, either through block decomposition or a channel-specific bias. Allowing negative eigenvalues or non-triangular transitions enables linear RNNs—including diagonal and Householder/DeltaNet forms—to capture parity and, under mild assumptions, regular languages [grazzi2025unlockingstatetrackinglinearrnns]. Complex-valued parameterizations provide another avenue for enhanced expressivity.
items.zh: 近期研究刻画了循环、恒定内存混合器能够维持的状态类型，揭示了先前基于 SSM 的模型中的算法缺陷。[merrill2025illusionstatestatespacemodels]表明，在有限精度下，实际 SSM 会坍缩到 TC0\mathrm{TC}^{0}，导致在 S5S_{5}上的排列组合等任务中失败，除非扩展原语。类似地，[yu2025blockbiasedmamba]证明单层 Mamba 不是通用逼近器。已有若干改进方案被提出以增强表达能力。例如，同一工作表明，块偏置变体仅通过微小改动（块分解或通道特定偏置）即可恢复通用逼近性质。允许负特征值或非三角转移使线性 RNN（包括对角和 Householder/DeltaNet 形式）能够捕捉奇偶性，并在温和假设下捕捉正则语言[grazzi2025unlockingstatetrackinglinearrnns]。复值参数化提供了增强表达能力的另一途径。

items.en: Structured SSMs prior to Mamba were frequently complex-valued, rooted in traditional SSM theory. They also generally excelled in domains such as vision and audio, which have explicit frequency-based information content, rather than language. While some models such as H3 [fu2023hungryhungryhipposlanguage], RetNet [sun2023retentivenetworksuccessortransformer], and Megalodon [ma2024megalodonefficientllmpretraining] kept complex-valued SSMs while targeting language modeling, they still noticeably underperformed Transformers.
items.zh: Mamba 之前的结构化 SSM 通常是复值的，根植于传统 SSM 理论。它们通常也在视觉和音频等具有显式频率信息内容的领域表现出色，而非语言。尽管一些模型如 H3[fu2023hungryhungryhipposlanguage]、RetNet[sun2023retentivenetworksuccessortransformer]和 Megalodon[ma2024megalodonefficientllmpretraining]在针对语言建模时保留了复值 SSM，但它们仍明显不如 Transformer。

items.en: Additionally, because these models were LTI and were computed using very different algorithms (in particular, convolutions or explicit recurrence) than modern selective SSMs such as Mamba, they generally did not use the RoPE trick to handle the complex part. An exception is RetNet, which introduced a model in between linear attention and Mamba-2 that used constant scalar decays (as opposed to no decay in LA and data-dependent decay in Mamba-2) with an additional constant complex phase that was implemented through RoPE.
items.zh: 此外，由于这些模型是 LTI 的，并且使用与 Mamba 等现代选择性 SSM 非常不同的算法（特别是卷积或显式循环）进行计算，它们通常不使用 RoPE 技巧来处理复数部分。一个例外是 RetNet，它引入了一个介于线性注意力和 Mamba-2 之间的模型，该模型使用常数标量衰减（与 LA 中的无衰减和 Mamba-2 中的数据依赖衰减相反），并带有一个通过 RoPE 实现的额外常数复数相位。

items.en: In general, complex numbers have been empirically found to be unhelpful for language modeling, and hence were phased out in Mamba-1 and successors, including parallel lines of work on linear attention and test-time training. Mamba-3 represents the first modern recurrent model with complex-valued state transitions, which were introduced for specific purposes of increasing expressivity and state-tracking ability. By incorporating the RoPE trick, this represents, to the best of our knowledge, the first usage of data-dependent RoPE grounded in theoretical motivations.
items.zh: 总体而言，经验发现复数对语言建模无益，因此在 Mamba-1 及其后续模型（包括线性注意力和测试时训练的并行工作线）中被逐步淘汰。Mamba-3 是第一个具有复值状态转移的现代循环模型，其引入是为了特定目的：增强表达能力和状态追踪能力。通过结合 RoPE 技巧，据我们所知，这是首次在理论动机基础上使用数据依赖的 RoPE。

items.en: S4 [S4] is a single-input, single-output LTI system where each dimension of the input was assigned its own independent SSM. Such SISO models have a significantly larger recurrent state than classical RNNs, and necessitated more complicated mathematical machinery to compute them efficiently. Aiming to simplify the model, S5 [S5] and LRU [LRU] replaced the set of SISO SSMs with a multi-input, multi-output SSM applied directly on the entire vectorized input. This change reduced the effective state capacity but enabled an alternate computation path by directly computing the recurrence with a parallel scan. While this trade-off between state capacity and modeling performance was less pronounced in LTI models, Mamba-1 (S6) [gu2024mambalineartimesequencemodeling] and Mamba-2 [dao2024transformersssmsgeneralizedmodels] returned to the SISO system due to the importance of a large state size in the time-varying setting. The computational bottleneck associated with the increased state size was addressed with a hardware-aware parallel scan algorithm for Mamba-1 and a matrix multiplication-based algorithm for Mamba-2.
items.zh: S4[S4]是一个单输入单输出 LTI 系统，其中输入的每个维度被分配了独立的 SSM。这种 SISO 模型具有比经典 RNN 显著更大的循环状态，并且需要更复杂的数学机制来高效计算。为了简化模型，S5[S5]和 LRU[LRU]将一组 SISO SSM 替换为直接应用于整个向量化输入的多输入多输出 SSM。这一变化降低了有效状态容量，但通过并行扫描直接计算循环，提供了另一种计算路径。虽然这种状态容量与建模性能之间的权衡在 LTI 模型中不太明显，但 Mamba-1(S6)[gu2024mambalineartimesequencemodeling]和 Mamba-2[dao2024transformersssmsgeneralizedmodels]由于在时变设置中大状态大小的重要性，回归到了 SISO 系统。与状态大小增加相关的计算瓶颈通过 Mamba-1 的硬件感知并行扫描算法和 Mamba-2 的基于矩阵乘法的算法得到解决。

items.en: The introduction of MIMO to Mamba-3 significantly diverges from prior work. Unlike previous MIMO models, which aimed to simplify training algorithms at the cost of slightly reduced expressivity, Mamba-3’s MIMO structure is motivated to increase modeling power while preserving inference efficiency. Accordingly, its state expansion is kept at Mamba-1/-2 levels to maintain modeling capabilities while trading off additional training compute.
items.zh: 将 MIMO 引入 Mamba-3 与先前工作显著不同。与旨在以略微降低表达能力为代价简化训练算法的先前 MIMO 模型不同，Mamba-3 的 MIMO 结构旨在增强建模能力同时保持推理效率。因此，其状态扩展保持在 Mamba-1/-2 水平以维持建模能力，同时以额外训练算力为代价。

items.en: Although modern recurrent models have several different viewpoints that largely converge (Section˜5.1), each framework has slightly different interpretations and motivations that can lead to different design spaces and extensions. In particular, linear attention and test-time training are more closely related and can perhaps be lumped together under a framework of associative memory that explicitly aims to memorize input data through “key-value” stores; either through approximations to the canonical KV method (i.e., quadratic attention) in LA, or by minimizing soft optimization objectives in TTT. On the other hand, state space models have a different lineage, as reflected both in terminology (e.g., A,B,C,XA,B,C,X instead of Q,K,VQ,K,V) and in their natural extensions. Notably, the methodological improvements in Mamba-3 are all associated with the SSM viewpoint specifically and are less motivated from associative memory frameworks.
items.zh: 尽管现代循环模型有几种大致趋同的不同视角（第 5.1 节），但每个框架都有略微不同的解释和动机，可能导致不同的设计空间和扩展。特别是，线性注意力和测试时训练关系更密切，或许可以归入联想记忆框架下，该框架旨在通过“键-值”存储显式记忆输入数据；要么通过 LA 中对经典 KV 方法（即二次注意力）的近似，要么通过 TTT 中最小化软优化目标。另一方面，状态空间模型有不同的谱系，这既体现在术语上（例如，A,B,C,XA,B,C,X 而非 Q,K,VQ,K,V），也体现在其自然扩展中。值得注意的是，Mamba-3 中的方法论改进都特别与 SSM 视角相关，而较少受联想记忆框架的启发。

items.en: Exponential-Trapezoidal Discretization. The SSM viewpoint entails the discretization of a continuous ODE governing the system; our exponential-trapezoidal discretization falls out of an improved discretization method. As associative memory methods do not use discretization, it is not obvious how to interpret a 3-term recurrence such as exponential-trapezoidal under alternate viewpoints.
items.zh: 指数-梯形离散化。SSM 视角涉及控制系统的连续 ODE 的离散化；我们的指数-梯形离散化源于改进的离散化方法。由于联想记忆方法不使用离散化，因此如何从其他视角解释诸如指数-梯形这样的三项循环并不明显。

items.en: Complex-Valued State Transitions. Complex SSMs have long been a staple of dynamical systems, and it is natural to consider complex values as an extension of selective SSMs. On the other hand, the associative memory framework interprets the AA state transition as a coefficient of an objective function, for example corresponding to the weight of an L2 regularization (or weight-decay) term in the optimization objective [wang2025testtimeregressionunifyingframework]. However, complex values are meaningless as the coefficient of a regression objective; hence, Mamba-3 is not obviously interpretable within these frameworks.
items.zh: 复值状态转移。复值 SSM 长期以来一直是动力系统的基本组成部分，将复值视为选择性 SSM 的扩展是自然的。另一方面，联想记忆框架将 AA 状态转移解释为目标函数的系数，例如对应于优化目标中 L2 正则化（或权重衰减）项的权重[wang2025testtimeregressionunifyingframework]。然而，复值作为回归目标的系数是无意义的；因此，Mamba-3 在这些框架中并不明显可解释。

items.en: Multi-Input, Multi-Output. MIMO is a classical concept from the state space model literature and does not naturally appear in associative memory (linear attention or test-time training) frameworks. However, we do note that the MIMO formulation introduced in this paper is not directly tied to SSM theory—and instead is motivated from a computational perspective—and our techniques can be adapted to other modern recurrent models as well.
items.zh: 多输入多输出。MIMO 是状态空间模型文献中的经典概念，在联想记忆（线性注意力或测试时训练）框架中自然不出现。然而，我们注意到本文引入的 MIMO 公式并不直接与 SSM 理论相关——而是从计算角度出发——我们的技术也可以适用于其他现代循环模型。

items.en: There continues to be vigorous progress in the development of linear-time sequence models, and the discussion here only captures a portion of them. We anticipate a growing space of unified frameworks, improved understanding, and new generalizations as the development of these models continually evolves.
items.zh: 线性时间序列模型的发展持续取得积极进展，这里的讨论仅涵盖了其中一部分。我们预计随着这些模型的不断发展，将出现越来越多的统一框架、改进的理解和新的推广。

items.en: We introduce Mamba-3, a state space model with several methodological improvements over prior SSMs: a more powerful recurrence via exponential-trapezoidal discretization; improved expressivity through complex-valued state transitions; and higher inference efficiency and modeling abilities with a MIMO formulation. The base SISO version of Mamba-3 delivers strong language modeling results, both standalone and in interleaved hybrid architectures, and advances the Pareto frontier on the performance-efficiency tradeoff over prior linear sequence models. The MIMO version trades off slower training for even stronger modeling power, while maintaining competitive inference efficiency compared to Mamba-2. Put together, the techniques in Mamba-3 show simple and theoretically motivated improvements from the state space model viewpoint, and open up new directions and design principles for efficient sequence models.
items.zh: 我们介绍了 Mamba-3，一个状态空间模型，在先前 SSM 基础上进行了若干方法论改进：通过指数-梯形离散化实现更强大的循环；通过复值状态转移增强表达能力；以及通过 MIMO 公式实现更高的推理效率和建模能力。Mamba-3 的基本 SISO 版本在语言建模方面取得了强劲结果，无论是单独使用还是在交错混合架构中，并在性能-效率权衡上超越了先前线性序列模型的帕累托前沿。MIMO 版本以更慢的训练为代价换取更强的建模能力，同时保持与 Mamba-2 相当的推理效率。综合来看，Mamba-3 中的技术展示了来自状态空间模型视角的简单且理论驱动的改进，并为高效序列模型开辟了新的方向和设计原则。
